highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Sri Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College - SMVEC Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by Sri Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College - SMVEC?
faqs.answer: Sri Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College - SMVEC is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MCA, MBA/PGDM courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Sri Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College - SMVEC are Civil Engineering, Information Technology, Computer Science Engineering, Power Engineering, VLSI Design, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Instrumentation Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Mechatronics Engineering.

faqs.question: What is the intake for offered courses at Sri Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College - SMVEC?
faqs.answer: The seats availability for offered courses at Sri Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College - SMVEC goes up to 1881. Courses offerred by Sri Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College - SMVEC are approved by eminent Government bodies such as AICTE.

faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at Sri Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College - SMVEC?
faqs.answer: The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Sri Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College - SMVEC is approximately INR 56000 - INR 170000.

placements.overview: A total of 63 students were admitted in year 2019-20 for 2 year PG degree at Sri Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College - SMVEC and 63 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 63 students 48 were placed with median salary of INR 425000 and 12 students opted for higher studies. A total of 928 students were admitted in year 2017-18 for 4 year UG degree at Sri Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College - SMVEC and 958 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 958 students 798 were placed with median salary of INR 475100 and 148 students opted for higher studies.For the batch ending 2020-21, the placement record for 2 year PG course at Sri Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College - SMVEC was 1.4%.The median package offered for the students during this session was INR 425000 Lakh. Sri Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College - SMVEC has a placement record of 1.2% for 4 year UG course.The median package offered for the batch ending 2020-21 at Sri Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College - SMVEC was INR 475100 Lakh.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sri Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College - SMVEC offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and B.A. LL.B. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. SMVEC fee structure ranges between INR 56,000 to 1,70,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Sri Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College - SMVEC provides programmes including B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MCA, MBA/PGDM in streams such as Engineering, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Civil Engineering, Information Technology, Computer Science Engineering, Power Engineering, VLSI Design, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Instrumentation Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Mechatronics Engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Experience in my college.

review_content.Placements: There are a total of 89% of students who got placed from my course. The highest package in my course is 4 LPA, and the highest package is 19 LPA. The top recruitment companies in my course are Google, Amazon, Microsoft, etc. A total of 80 percent of students got internships from my course at Microsoft. The top roles offered in my course are HR and manager.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in my course are Wi-Fi, with full speed and 24/7 availability. Labs are very big, and all resources are available. Classrooms are big and well-cleaned with digital boards. A well-stocked library is present with all resources available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: To shine in your career, choose the best here, the best Sri Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College.

review_content.Placements: At Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College, more than 85% of students got placed in top companies. The starting salary is about 3.5 LPA, especially in our department. Companies like TCS, Kaar, Zoho, Wipro, Cognizant, etc., are ready to hire students. About 78% of students got internships, and some with a stipend.
review_content.Infrastructure: About 150 acres of college with environmental amenities, and AICTE approved idea lab and library facilities. Hostel facility has been split into two, one is with AC and another without AC. Canteen food is also available in our college with good quality.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sri Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College.

review_content.Placements: Placements at SMVEC are exceptional with over 95 percent of students placed annually. Top recruiters include Tech Core and Zenosys. The dedicated Career Services Cell conducts regular training sessions and mock interviews which are top notch and very nice.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at Sri Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College is modern and functional. The campus boasts smart classrooms, advanced laboratories, a digital library, an innovation hub and Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms. The eco-friendly architecture includes solar-powered buildings and green spaces.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It is worth for money because the college is so good in everything but the sports are only less.

review_content.Placements: If we have a good CGPA, we will get good placements, but it doesn't mean that those with lower CGPAs won't have chances. There are many companies like TCS, Woho, and Vibrio are coming to our college. They provide placement training for all students, so placements are good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is so excellent. They have good infrastructure and they are building the new hostel. Classrooms and labs are in a good manner. The ideal lab of the college has a very good atmosphere. There we can get so many ideas.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied because of faculty, average placements and no enjoyment.

review_content.Placements: 80% of students were placed in this course in our college. The highest package is 18 LPA, and the average package is 3.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are TCS, Hexaware, Zoho, CTS, etc. The roles offered include Machine Learning Engineer, AI Engineer, Data Analyst, and Software Engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructures are good for labs and the library, but in the classroom, it's average. They can't provide Wi-Fi for class; we have to use our personal devices. Hostels are not too good; they are moderate. Canteen food is also average, but prices are high compared to quantity and quality.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Insights on Course Structure and Faculty in Computer Science.

review_content.Placements: Nearly most of the students were placed in my batch, and it's still going on. Up to date, the highest salary was offered by Content Sack, a figure of 13 LPA. There are further more companies offering a minimum of 4 LPA. The company named Zoho took an intern from our batch, and other companies like Hexaware and Multicore also provided internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Coming to infrastructure, I would say that it's below average. They provide Wi-Fi within the circumstances, and it's not good either. The classrooms are good. Coming to labs, it's very well-equipped with updated systems, and the library is provided with more than 10,000 books of different genres.

admission_overview.college_name: SMVEC Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: SMVEC admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.SMVECoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include B.Arch, B.A. LL.B., MBA/PGDM and MCA. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 1,70,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 54 months - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

highlights.description: SMVEC is one of India’s top institutes and has been ranked by multiple national ranking bodies. In the recent NIRF 2025 release, the institute ranked #201-300 under the Engineering category. The institute is popular for its top-notch research programmes. The below article covers all the information around SMVEC rankings:

rankings.highlight: 3rd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Pondicherry In 2025

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, SMVEC outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is to be noted that the SMVEC's rankings in 'Engineering' category have demonstrated stability in trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, SMVEC's rank is #201, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.

outlook.description:
SMVEC has been ranked well by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Engineering (Private)' category. Through the years, the Outlook-ICARE rankings for SMVEC indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook-ICARE.

reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure with good lab facilities. There are high-quality computer labs and clean classrooms. A library is available for the students in the AI & DS block. We also have a canteen with some snacks. There are sports like basketball, cricket, and badminton. Students can join NCC for a good career.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty are too good. They will give you better understanding of the concepts.
reviews.review_text: Hostel according to me deserves a one-star. The rooms are small enough to accommodate only one person, however, two need to stay in one room. There is no AC availability here. If you need AC you have to pay 75,000 extra per year for it which is completely absurd. Hostel mess food is also not that great. There has been insects everywhere in the food time and again and we have complained about it multiple times, but no action has been taken. So in my opinion, paying 200000 for this hostel is not a...

reviews.review_heading: Don't waste your life by joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is excellent, but sometimes there are many damages in the roads and classrooms, which get worse when it rains. We have libraries, but they don't have a period for reading. If you are interested, you can go to the admin office, get a library pass, and use the library. Other than that, the canteen service is not as good as you might think; it feels like a scam, so choose wisely.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college which is student friendly.
reviews.review_text: There were many such facilities in the college, such as Wi-Fi access that was available. We had classrooms in all the classes, and the labs were well managed and organized with good quality chairs. There were all kinds of ways we could get hands-on experience. I don't live in a hostel because I live in my house.

reviews.review_heading: Strict college but strictness and discipline makes you stronger.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is inspired by Western architecture and Portuguese architecture. The college environment is very strict; boys and girls can not talk on campus. The college library is good; it is open until 9 p.m. and six days a week. There is no proper drinking water facility on campus; drinking water comes in cans. The hostel fee is 60,000 plus a 5,000 deposit. Mess food is there but frankly, mess food is not good and not hygienic. There is no big canteen on campus, so we can not eat whe...

reviews.review_heading: The review about my college.
reviews.review_text: My college has good infrastructure and a peaceful environment. They have separate buildings for each stream, like engineering, arts and sciences, law and so on. The labs are good but the equipment is a little bit old and the classrooms are simple and don't have projectors in them. In a library, you can't access all the books in it and its tough to take books in a library. About hostels, they have separate hostels for boys and girls but girls hostels are at medical colleges, and they have two bui...

reviews.review_heading: I got new friends and good staffs in this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel Facilities: The hostel facilities are in good condition and the improvements to the hostel are not a must. The rooms are in good condition, the hostel food is very good and the registration process for the hostel and affordability are given in the admission block.

faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

placements.overview:
Established in 1992, Swamy Vivekanandha College of Pharmacy, Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for Women is located in Namakkal, Tamil Nadu. The institute offers courses like B.Pharma, M.Pharma, D.Pharma and Pharm.D. These courses are offered in Full Time mode. A total of 10 courses offered by the Institute are available across stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

Swamy Vivekanandha College of Pharmacy, Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for Women offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.Pharma and D.Pharma. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Swamy Vivekanandha College of Pharmacy, Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for Women offers M.Pharma. The fees for Swamy Vivekanandha College of Pharmacy, Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for Women courses range between INR 1,36,000 to 5,22,000.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Swamy Vivekanandha College of Pharmacy, Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for Women offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.Pharma and D.Pharma. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Swamy Vivekanandha College of Pharmacy, Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for Women offers M.Pharma. The fees for Swamy Vivekanandha College of Pharmacy, Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for Women courses range between INR 1,36,000 to 5,22,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It's a very good facility to study in our college.

review_content.Placements: We got best internship and placement in our college. At least 90% students are placed in a placement. Internships are very useful for students studying in our college. There are batches which having morning shift and evening shift for the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have medical facilities near hostel. In the evening we are playing on the ground. Safety and security are a must. Well, checking out pass security, for incoming and outgoing students and parents. Foods are worth the fees. It's very tasty and healthy. On the way home, they provide a bus. Lab facilities are very useful for gaining practical experience.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutics - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: College with well-experienced faculty members and high infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: In PG, 90% students were placed in various industries, and a few became teaching staff in the same institute. High infrastructure laboratory. Organizing camps and awareness programs in public, and we have Wi-Fi facility as well. Only in MPHARM co-education is there in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: In the hostel, we have 3 B.Ed plus attached batch rooms. Cloth washing service is available. Television is available for students. Gym facility is also there for students. Sports activities are there. Bus service to home on holidays, specifically for girls.

reviews_list.batch_info: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Info About Doctor of Pharmacy in SVCP

review_content.Placements: In Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D), there are only 30 seats per year. In our college, only women are allowed to do this course. Daily, we have practical hours or ward rounds in the hospital, which are very interesting. The internship can be done in the same hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is equipped with labs, classrooms, a library (both General and department), a digital library, and a computer lab with a network connection. The hospital, pharmacy, and canteen are also associated with it. We have many specialties in the hospital such as cardio, gynecology, neuro, ortho, and general medicine.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, our college is good.

review_content.Placements: 100% of students got placed. All the students got internships in hospitals, private clinics and authorized pharmacy centers. The roles offered are amazing. I love this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good. Hostel food and facilities are also good. The quality of the food was good. The hostel environment was great. There are a lot of spaces to play. And a lot of food to eat. Events are organized for our students. There is nothing negative about our college.
review_content.Faculty: Yes, the faculty members are well knowledgeable in my college. Yes, it is tough, but it is interesting to study. Study well and do well. Well, Knowledge staffs are here to use it and grow. I was satisfied, and I enjoyed studying at our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good for education and hospital training.

review_content.Placements: Our college takes a right and special care for placement sessions. Placements are handled by well-experienced experts who mould us to a new form that make us smart and bold to choose the right path we are good in. Various job roles are offered to the students as we learn various subjects deeply throughout the course curriculum. Our college provides an internship opportunity in large industries based on the area of interest.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good, clean and well-maintained classrooms. Labs are good to meet the practical requirements. Our college also provides Powerpoint classes, seminars by our friends, computer lab with free internet access, e-books from well-established journal sites and digital library. Our college provides a good hostel facility. The canteen serves hygienic food for students. The campus is placed beside the multispeciality Vivekananda Medical Care Hospital, which reduces the treatment fee for the parents of every student.

hostel_campus.college_name: Swamy Vivekanandha College of Pharmacy Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Institute has excellent accommodation facilities with well furnished double and four occupancy rooms, Sprawling and Artistic layout, Hygienic Kitchen, Spacious Dining Halls, Indoor Courts for Shuttle & Table Tennis. Every hostels are provided with STD and ISD call services.

library.description: Swamy Vivekanadha College of Pharmacy has a library with an excellent collection of books like Pharmaceutics, Anatomy, Physiology, Pharmacology, Pharmacy Practice, Pharmaceutical and Medicinal chemistry, Pharmacognosy and Biotechnology and also journals. It maintains separate collections of Reference Books, Pharmacopeias, Bound volumes of journals, Theses, Video Cassettes, Compact Discs and Microforms. The library is using OPAC (Online Public Access Catalogue), wherein the users can search the Library Online Catalogue by Author's name, title, subject, and keywords available on the campus LAN. 3602CDs – Books and periodicals, 10 Computers for Library Networking + Delnet + 4 Nos e-Journals (1. IEEE, 2. ASTM Digital Library, 3. Elsevier –Science Direct, 4. J.Gate), E-Books 1350 Nos. are also available to the students. The intitute has the membership of DELNET, TERRI, British Council, National Geographic.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Volleyball

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at NSHM Business School Kolkata are MBA, MHA at the PG level and BBA at the UG level. Further, the PG programmes are offered for a two-year duration, whereas the BBA programme is offered for a four-year duration. NSHM Business School courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students to prepare them for the industry.
NSHM Kolkata Business School extends a range of courses with their flagship programmes being BBA at the UG level, and MBA & MHA at the PG level. The PG level courses at NSHM Campus Kolkata for a duration of 2 years while the BBA courses are extended for a duration of 3-4 years.
The BBA courses is available in a wide range of specialisations including: Hospital Management, Global Business, Sports Management, Accountancy Taxation & Auditing, Accountancy Taxation & Auditing (with BSEI Certification), and Banking & Financial Services.
For more details about NSHM Kolkata Business School refer to the below-mentioned videos:

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Global Business - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Totally satisfied because of facilities, faculty, and good opportunities and placements.

review_content.Placements: The lowest package is around Rs 1,00,000 and the highest is around Rs 5,00,000-6,00,000. Recruiting companies are Calvin Klein, Amazon, Google, etc. Around 20-40% of students get internships in companies like Calvin Klein. The top roles offered by our college are MBA, Maharashtra, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many labs, and the entire campus has Wi-Fi facilities. There are 2 libraries on the campus. The canteen is divided into two parts: one part is managed by in-house hotel management students, and the other by handicapped people who are given the opportunity to work and earn money.

reviews_list.batch_info: - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: It is a great brand to go for MBA.

review_content.Placements: There is an average placement. If you are looking for marketing and finance, you can opt for it. Faculty members are good. There is less scope for HR in this college. The rest that is finance and marketing is good. The average salary of 3 LPA to 8 LPA was provided to the students. Good companies come for placements such as Nestle, Godrej, HDFC, PWC, Edelweiss, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a great infrastructure. There are AC classrooms, audio-visual room, language lab, personality development classes, hi-tech computer lab and big library are available. Despite everything, a world-class canteen is available. You can opt for this college. Student parking is also provided in the college.

review_summary.college_name: NSHM Business School Kolkata Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am not happy with the faculty members and placements are the worst.

content.Placements: Despite coming from a finance background we were informed that there's no job related to finance so you'll be sitting for sales job marketing and some BPO jobs. Students like me coming from a mediocre background can't say no. Students from my batch were sitting and giving interviews for the sales job. Till now only 2 students have been placed so placement here in this college is more than the worst and the highest package now provided is around 5.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and library are good but can be better. The canteen is more like a fish market. The college is not interested in other sports and always gives priority to cricket and football and sometimes badminton. Can't say anything about the hostel till now because I've never been there.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Banking and Financial Services - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Have a look at the life of NSHM College.

content.Placements: NSHM provides 100% placement to their students. The average salary package offered by this college is above 5 LPA. Internship opportunities are available for all students related to their field. Manager, branch manager, and officer in charge are some of the roles which are offered by them in our course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi and other technology needs are available for the respective branches. Books are well-explained and useful for studies. Hostel is well-maintained sometimes we may face some discomfort in the food section but most of the time they maintain good hygiene. Indoor games are available like carrom board, table tennis, chess, etc. Medical facilities are also available for students who need.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Global Business - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Totally satisfied because of facilities, faculty, and good opportunities and placements.

content.Placements: The lowest package is around Rs 1,00,000 and the highest is around Rs 5,00,000-6,00,000. Recruiting companies are Calvin Klein, Amazon, Google, etc. Around 20-40% of students get internships in companies like Calvin Klein. The top roles offered by our college are MBA, Maharashtra, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There are many labs, and the entire campus has Wi-Fi facilities. There are 2 libraries on the campus. The canteen is divided into two parts: one part is managed by in-house hotel management students, and the other by handicapped people who are given the opportunity to work and earn money.

individual_reviews.course: - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It is a great brand to go for MBA.

content.Placements: There is an average placement. If you are looking for marketing and finance, you can opt for it. Faculty members are good. There is less scope for HR in this college. The rest that is finance and marketing is good. The average salary of 3 LPA to 8 LPA was provided to the students. Good companies come for placements such as Nestle, Godrej, HDFC, PWC, Edelweiss, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There is a great infrastructure. There are AC classrooms, audio-visual room, language lab, personality development classes, hi-tech computer lab and big library are available. Despite everything, a world-class canteen is available. You can opt for this college. Student parking is also provided in the college.

individual_reviews.course: - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: NSHM is the best college in town.

content.Placements: We are done with the placements. Not once, but got the opportunity in the various organisations. After getting selected, we were given the option of sitting for many opportunities. The teachers always looked at the students and guided them accordingly as per what they should go for and what are the qualities needed for cracking the interview.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is the best in the town. As per the industry standards, it matches all the facilities. The classes are fitted with A/C and the fans. The labs are well-equipped with the computer systems. The library contains most of the study materials. The quality of food in the canteen is better, and the standard of the canteen is the best.

admission_overview.college_name: NSHM Business School Kolkata Admission 2025 (Open): Eligibility, Application Process

admission_process.title: NSHM Business School, Kolkata Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: NSHM Business School, Kolkata admissionsare primarily entrance-based. The college offers courses in the fields of Management and Hospital Administration. Students can pursue an MBA, E-MBA and MHA at the postgraduate level, while BBA is offered at the undergraduate level. Aspirants are shortlisted on an entrance basis for an MBA, while merit in the last qualifying exam is considered for BBA admission along with the institute-level aptitude test. Further, students need to clear the institute-level selection rounds, such as GDPI for final selection. The application process for the college commences online via the official website. Interested students can read the following article to know all about the courses, admission criteria, and admission procedure forNSHM Business School, Kolkata.

NSHM Business School, Kolkata admission 2025are open for the offered courses. Interested students can complete the application online. The college offers several courses across various specialisations in full-time mode. Aspirants can check out the following table to gather key highlights for NSHM Business School, Kolkata:

NSHM Business School, Kolkata course admissionis subject to clearance of the preset admission criteria. Students seeking to enrol into the college must ensure that they satisfy both the eligibility and selection criteria. For admission to the MBA programme, students need to provide a valid score obtained in the accepted entrance test. As for the other courses, students are selected on ENPAT conducted by the college followed by institute-level selection rounds, such as PI or other criteria. The table below mentions the details of the eligibility & selection criteria forNSHM Business School, Kolkata courses:
PI + Group Activity + SOP

To get a seat in the courses offered at NSHM Business School, Kolkata, candidates need to complete a multi-step procedure that starts with registration. Students need to ensure that they satisfy the admission criteria of the programme. Interested students can apply online. For MBA admission, students need to keep in hand the required entrance exam scores. Aspirants can follow the steps explained below to complete theNSHM Business School, Kolkata admission process:
Step 1: Application Process
Interested candidates can apply online for the desired course at the official website of the college. Students need to fill up the online application form and complete the entire process.
Step 2: Selection Process

Students are shortlisted based on the preset admission criteria. Admission to the course is mostly entrance-based. For MBA admission, candidates are shortlisted based on their scores in the national-level entrance tests followed by PI. Similarly, students need to appear for ENPAT followed by PI/ Group Activity (whichever is applicable).
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Once candidates are selected, the college informs them about their selection. Shortlisted candidates are required to pay theNSHM Business School, Kolkata feeto get admission.

faqs.question: Is MBA available at NSHM Business School, Kolkata?

faqs.question: How can I get admission in NSHM Business School, Kolkata for MBA?
faqs.answer: To get admission in the MBA course offered at NSHM Business School, Kolkata, candidates have to fulfil the eligibility and selection criteria. Students then need to apply online and sit for ENPAT and PI conducted by the college. Once admission offer is made, selected students have to pay the admission fees.

Candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the school. Apart from course fee, aspirants also need to pay a registration fee in the start.

Similarly, for PG course admissions, candidates need to complete graduation. As for E-MBA course, a minimum work experience of two years is also required. Aside from the eligibility, students also need to clear the selection rounds for final admission.

For final selection, candidates have to go through the multi-step procedure as prescribed by the college.

faqs.question: What are the courses offered at NSHM Business School, Kolkata?
faqs.answer: NSHM Business School, Kolkata mainly offers four programmes. These courses are offered in full-time mode at undergraduate and postgraduate levels. Students can pursueMBA, MHA, and Executive MBAat PG level, whileBBAis provided at UG level. Interested students must ensure that they meet the eligibility of the preferred course. To apply, students can visit the official website of the institute.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to NSHM Business School, Kolkata?
faqs.answer: To get admission into NSHM Buisness School, Kolkata, students need to complete the entire admission process which includes multiple steps. The first step is to check whether students fulfil the eligibility criteria of the desired course. Eligible students are then required to apply online at the official website of the college. Students are then selected based on the criteria decided by the college. For MBA admission, candidates are required to provide valid scores obtained in any of the accepted entrance tests, such as CAT/ MAT, etc. For other courses, students need to clear the ENPAT test followed by PI or other rounds of selection. reviews.review_heading: I am not happy with the faculty members and placements are the worst.
reviews.review_text:
Classrooms and library are good but can be better. The canteen is more like a fish market. The college is not interested in other sports and always gives priority to cricket and football and sometimes badminton.
Can't say anything about the hostel till now because I've never been there.

reviews.review_heading: Have a look at the life of NSHM College.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi and other technology needs are available for the respective branches. Books are well-explained and useful for studies. Hostel is well-maintained sometimes we may face some discomfort in the food section but most of the time they maintain good hygiene. Indoor games are available like carrom board, table tennis, chess, etc. Medical facilities are also available for students who need.

reviews.review_heading: Totally satisfied because of facilities, faculty, and good opportunities and placements.
reviews.review_text: There are many labs, and the entire campus has Wi-Fi facilities. There are 2 libraries on the campus. The canteen is divided into two parts: one part is managed by in-house hotel management students, and the other by handicapped people who are given the opportunity to work and earn money.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great brand to go for MBA.
reviews.review_text: There is a great infrastructure. There are AC classrooms, audio-visual room, language lab, personality development classes, hi-tech computer lab and big library are available. Despite everything, a world-class canteen is available. You can opt for this college. Student parking is also provided in the college.

reviews.review_heading: NSHM is the best college in town.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best in the town. As per the industry standards, it matches all the facilities. The classes are fitted with A/C and the fans. The labs are well-equipped with the computer systems. The library contains most of the study materials. The quality of food in the canteen is better, and the standard of the canteen is the best.

reviews.review_heading: Average college and average placements.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is kind of good.
It is a state of art campus, which has all the basic facilities like library, Wi-Fi, computer lab, study room, indoor games facility, etc. There is a cafeteria which serves reasonably good food at affordable prices.

NSHM thrives on marketing. This is practically an all show and no go college. The college has great faculty but only on paper. All good students can’t be good teachers. The college has the most expensive mac labs but lacked proper canteen. Practical assignments were very few, there was hardly an enthusiasm among teachers who taught like government schools. Placement was guaranteed but not fulfilled. Spend your money wisely. NSHM thrives on marketing. This is practically an all show and no go college. The college has great faculty but only on paper. All good students can’t be good teachers. The college has the most expensive mac labs but lacked proper canteen. Practical assignments were very few, there was hardly an enthusiasm among teachers who taught like government schools. Placement was guaranteed but not fulfilled. Spend your money wisely.

reviews.review_heading: Overall satisfied with NSHM, Kolkata.
reviews.review_text: Well-equipped classrooms, libraries with a vast collection of books, and computer labs with the latest technology. Facilities are satisfactory to good, particularly in terms of hostel infrastructure and sports/games. While the mess food is often described as decent, some students express concerns about monotony. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Looks good outside but is dirty inside, no AC, bad food, poor faculty, not worth the fees.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi in the college except when we need to take exams on our laptops. Classrooms are old and outdated. The benches are not comfortable, and most importantly, there is no AC. All the rooms are very hot. There are no proper games or sports facilities. In fact, there is no playground. Canteen food is just overpriced.

reviews.review_heading: It has a bad campus infrastructure, no good amenities, and average placements.
reviews.review_text: The college promised us AC classrooms and very good amenities which none is fulfilled. There are no proper Wi-Fi and AC facilities. Labs and library are well with computer labs having AC. There is no such proper hostel facility as of my knowledge because mostly all my classmates from out of town used to rent and stay. The canteen food is nice and the initiative of building the Mitti cafe is for physically challenging people, which is really a very good initiative. No proper medical amenities are...

review_summary.college_name: NSHM Business School Durgapur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good learning environment with helpful teachers and an active campus.

content.Placements: I completed my BBA from NSHM Durgapur, and overall, experience was decent. Our batch, around 65 to 70 percent of students, got placed. Highest package offered was nearly 6 LPA, lowest was about 2.5 LPA and average package came to around 3.5 LPA. Top recruiters included Deloitte, Wipro, TCS, HDFC Bank and a few good startups. Around 60 percent of students also managed to get internships in companies like ICICI, Reliance and other reputed organizations.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure for BBA course at NSHM Durgapur is good. Classrooms are spacious, well-furnished and have smart boards with proper ventilation. Campus has good Wi-Fi connectivity, a well-stocked library and seminar halls for presentations. Though it's a management course, there are computer labs for projects and online work. Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms, regular water supply and basic furnishings. Mess food is average with a mix of vegetarian and non-vegetarian options and canteen has affordable snacks. Medical facilities are available on campus. There is space for indoor games and a ground for outdoor sports.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best college for BBA in Durgapur.

content.Placements: Our college offers a good percentage of placements and internships for students. My course is BBA, and this year the placements for BBA were excellent. Students received an average package of 2-3 LPA, while the highest package, as far as I know, is between 5-6 LPA. 95% of students secured internships through the college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The classrooms are spacious, and the desks are of good quality. We have projectors in every class for digital learning, and Wi-Fi is available to everyone on campus. All the labs are fully air-conditioned, and the hostel is also suitable for students coming from far away from home. Indoor games and a gym facility are also available.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Hospital Administration (MHA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of NSHM Business School, Durgapur.

content.Placements: 100% of students are provided with summer and winter internships. About 95-96% of students are placed during their internship period. I'm currently in the second sem and already 6 students have been placed with good packages in various administrative roles in the hospital.
content.Infrastructure: The campus provides free Wi-Fi to all the students, I'm not a hosteler but my friends in the hostel are getting every facility with good meals. There's a canteen for day scholar students for lunch, a cafeteria for gossip, and a sports complex for different games and sports.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Sports Management - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: NSHM College Durgapur: A leading hub for professional and technical education.

content.Placements: Placements are average. Companies visit the college every 6 months and we can apply if we are in 1st year also. In sports management, internships are provided every month and by attending internship sports students can gain knowledge more. Students get internships in Cricket Stadium for international matches also. I also worked in a recent match of India vs England.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are not that good but we get clean and hygienic rooms every day. We also get a Wi-Fi connection. Hostel students get a canteen card and a gym card. Labs are more advanced for B.Tech students which helps them to perform well in their work. The library is full of books which helps students sit, read, and gain more.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued Jan(2026) BBA in Hospital Management - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: NSHM - An Unbiased Review.

content.Placements: I've just passed out from my college in the year of 2025. Regarding my placements, I have got a placement in the Main Apollo Hospital, which is one of the greatest hospitals across Asia. My dream was to become a healthcare administrator in a higher position. But currently, I am enjoying my job as a junior associate in the patient care services at Apollo Hospital Chennai. My college gave me the opportunity for my internships as well as my placements, with a good salary package, which is approximately around 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: I have been staying in the hostel, and the hostel facilities are way too good. I have never seen this type of hostel at a very low price. They provide good food, full Wi-Fi connections, labs, and a good library. There are many printed books and journals. The quality of facilities in the hostel is way too high, which other colleges cannot afford at this time. Every year, we have an annual sports competition, and an inter-college sports competition, which includes both indoor and outdoor games.

Direct admission is offered to candidates who manage to fulfil the basic eligibility criteria on the basis of past academics. There are a total of120seats in MBA/PGDM at NSHM Business School, Durgapur. The total tuition fee charged for MBA/PGDM here isINR 5,37,500. Check the following section to know more about NSHM Business School, Durgapur MBA/PGDM admissions.

faqs.question: Does NSHM B-School Durgapur accept GMAT scores for MBA?
faqs.answer: No, NSHM Business School, Durgapur does not accept GMAT score. The accepted entrance exams for MBA course admission areMAT/XAT/CAT/CMAT/JEMAT. It is also necessary that the aspirant is a graduate from a recognised university to be eligible for the course.

courses_data.name: NSHM Business School, Durgapur BBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: NSHM Business School, Durgapuroffers BBA programme that lasts for 3 - 4 years. Students are accepted to BBA programme based on merit. The total tuition fee charged for BBA here isINR 2,75,200-4,86,300. However, there are other components also which can be included in the total fee amount, such as application charges, exam fee, etc. Read on to know more about the NSHM Business School, Durgapur BBA.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BBA at NSHM Business School, Durgapur?
faqs.answer: ForNSHM Business School BBAcourse admission, a candidate should have passed Class 12 from any recognised board with English as a subject. The students appearing for the qualifying exam or awaiting the results are also eligible to apply.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to NSHM Business School Durgapur?
faqs.answer: Candidates fulfilling the course-specific eligibility and selection criteria can apply for the course. In addition, candidates appearing for the final-year exam can also apply. Eligible aspirants can fill out the NSHM Business School application form online through its official website.

faqs.question: How many courses are offered by NSHM Business School Durgapur?
faqs.answer: The courses offered by the business institute are MBA, BBA, and Master in Hospital Administration. BBA course apart from the general course is available in different specialisations, including Banking & Finance, Sports Management, and Hospital Management.

faqs.question: How to apply at NSHM Business School Durgapur?
faqs.answer: NSHM Business School Durgapur application form can be submitted online. faqs.question: What is the application mode for MBA course at NSHM Business School Durgapur?
faqs.answer: The mode of NSHM Business School Durgapur admission is online and based on merit. Candidates need to fill a registration form to apply for a programme. hostel_campus.college_name: NSHM Business School Durgapur Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Good learning environment with helpful teachers and an active campus.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for BBA course at NSHM Durgapur is good. Classrooms are spacious, well-furnished and have smart boards with proper ventilation. Campus has good Wi-Fi connectivity, a well-stocked library and seminar halls for presentations. Though it's a management course, there are computer labs for projects and online work. Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms, regular water supply and basic furnishings. Mess food is average with a mix of vegetarian and non-vegetarian options and cantee...

reviews.review_heading: Best college for BBA in Durgapur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The classrooms are spacious, and the desks are of good quality. We have projectors in every class for digital learning, and Wi-Fi is available to everyone on campus. All the labs are fully air-conditioned, and the hostel is also suitable for students coming from far away from home. Indoor games and a gym facility are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of NSHM Business School, Durgapur.
reviews.review_text: The campus provides free Wi-Fi to all the students, I'm not a hosteler but my friends in the hostel are getting every facility with good meals. There's a canteen for day scholar students for lunch, a cafeteria for gossip, and a sports complex for different games and sports.

reviews.review_heading: NSHM College Durgapur: A leading hub for professional and technical education.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are not that good but we get clean and hygienic rooms every day. We also get a Wi-Fi connection. Hostel students get a canteen card and a gym card. Labs are more advanced for B.Tech students which helps them to perform well in their work. The library is full of books which helps students sit, read, and gain more.

reviews.review_heading: NSHM - An Unbiased Review.
reviews.review_text: I have been staying in the hostel, and the hostel facilities are way too good. I have never seen this type of hostel at a very low price. They provide good food, full Wi-Fi connections, labs, and a good library. There are many printed books and journals. The quality of facilities in the hostel is way too high, which other colleges cannot afford at this time. Every year, we have an annual sports competition, and an inter-college sports competition, which includes both indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Moderate college as per the fee.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, but the computers are not. There is no good computer in the college for practical. There are sports complexes and gyms for both girls and boys but they are used at different times of the day. There is no fear of ragging inside the college. The mess food is good, but sometimes they ruin it.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for your jobs.
reviews.review_text: The college provides access to high-speed internet connectivity on campus. Classrooms: The college has multimedia-enhanced classrooms with acoustics designed for interactivity. Library: The college library has a reading room, computers, and reprography facilities. The library also offers access to journals, books, and previous year question papers. Seminar Libraries: Each department has its own seminar library.

reviews.review_heading: A review of campus life as a student at NSHM Knowledge Campus, Durgapur.
reviews.review_text: All the required infrastructures were available to us, like Wi-Fi connectivity all around the campus for all the students with around 30Mbps speed, smart board-equipped classrooms, and a massive computer lab with around 100+ computers with cross-connectivity among them, meaning no matter which computer you get, you will have access to your last work by logging through the firewall. A library with vast amount of books and also an online portal to access the books on the go. The food available is ...

reviews.review_heading: Good for placement to kickstart your career.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good, with comfortable classrooms, labs, and a library as well. The mess food is good, healthy, and hygienic. They also provide medical facilities if you are sick. They have a very good sports ground and gaming rooms to enjoy.

reviews.review_heading: NSHM Knowledge Campus Durgapur: The best way of learning with job security.
reviews.review_text: The college features a big cafeteria, a sports complex indoors and outdoors, and 2 large libraries. All classrooms are now Wi-Fi connected. Speaking of hostels, students get sharing rooms in the hostel. There's also one canteen, and the food quality is good.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and expecting good placement in the future.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best in Durgapur and quite developed; it has good teachers and students; the staff is good and well-cared for; they take care of everyone in the college and are very well-behaved; and the college guards are well-spoken and good people.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Eastern India.
reviews.review_text: The NSHM Durgapur Campus has an area of 35 acres. On this beautiful campus, we have two libraries, AI labs, basic computer labs, advanced engineering labs, and most specifically, the greenery out here. We have a playground, an indoor game complex, a yoga room, etc. There are two separate hostels for boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: Placements in MNCs, Beautiful Lush Green Campus, Unique Cultural Fest.
reviews.review_text: While not all classrooms have air conditioning, all labs are equipped with it. The library is well-maintained, and the book-issuing system is strict. Campus-wide Wi-Fi with good speed is available. The hostel facilities include an indoor gym, outdoor sports field, mess, and canteen. The canteen serves hygienic food, and the token system is used for outsiders, while hostellers pay directly.

reviews.review_heading: Nshm business school campus is great.
reviews.review_text: Yes, there was free Wi-Fi in canteen areas, and the classrooms are quiet good. The library is a very big place where you can find any kind of course-related book. Yes, the quality of the food is very good. And also, sports and medical facilities are quite good.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides average faculty members and placements are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are good. Wi-Fi is slow, and laboratories are average. Classrooms are fine, and it also provides a good library. The hostel is very expensive, and the food served in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities are good, but the rent is expensive.

overview_faqs.question: Why choose BAU Ranchi?
overview_faqs.answer: Birsa Agriculture University was established in 1981. This university is dedicated to advancing Agriculture, Forestry, Animal Husbandry, Dairy, and the Fishery sectors, especially for the resource-poor farmers present in Jharkhand. The below-mentioned are the reasons to choose this university:Multiple course offeringsBirsa Agriculture University is known for its undergraduate, postgraduate, PhD, certificate, and various other programmes. These programmes are provided across the Agriculture, Forestry, and various other streams. Multiple career opportunitiesBTech and BSc students are placed in top companies at top positions. BTech students can become Engineers or can go for various other job profiles.Good placementsThe below-mentioned are the Bihar Agricultural University placement statistics:ParticularsStatistics 2024No. of students placed (UG-4 year)109Median package offeredINR 6 LPANo. of students placed (UG-5 year)25Median package offeredINR 7.50 LPANote: The above-mentioned data is

overview_faqs.question: How many constituent colleges are there under the BAU Ranchi?
overview_faqs.answer: BAU Ranchi, through various constituent colleges, offers postgraduate, undergraduate, and other courses to students. The below-mentioned are the Bihar Agricultural University constituent colleges list:BAU Ranchi Constituent CollegesCollege of Horticulture West SinghbhumCollege For Bio-Technology, RanchiCollege of Fisheries Science, GumlaCollege of Agricultural Engineering, RanchiAgriculture College, GarhwaTilka Manjhi Agriculture College, GoddaRabindra Nath Tagore College Of Agriculture, Deoghar--

overview_faqs.question: Is Birsa Agriculture University good?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Birsa Agriculture University is a good college. Birsa Agriculture University has collaborated with various companies and organisations such as the Ministry of Agriculture, Government of India, Indian Council of Agriculture Research, New Delhi, Indian Agricultural Research Institute (IARI), New Delhi, and others. The collaborations provide greater knowledge seeking opportunities to students and are good for the college's reputation building as well.

review_summary.college_name: Birsa Agriculture University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Forestry - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Average for graduation, best for gathering life experiences, best one.

content.Placements: Forestry being a very unique subject and one of the most rare ones. The batch strength goes to just 50. This directly means that only 50 Forestry graduates are passing with this B.Sc. Forestry course every year from Jharkhand, as this is the sole college in our state. The placement cell of the college is genuinely very poor. However, the seniors never leave the juniors; they do help them to get better posts and achieve success!
content.Infrastructure: Top-notch! No doubts, the best one! The quality of the facilities of the hostel, the food quality of the hostel, and the quality of food available in the mess and canteen are the best among all departments of the university. Medical facilities are not up to the mark! Sports and games are okay, but there are no instructors!

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Sciences and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & AH) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I would say that please use funds in the improvement of college, not improvement of own your houses.

content.Placements: There are no placement facilities, and we have to search for jobs and PG opportunities on our own. It's not that good. There is no reputation of this college in a good book, and there is no reach after graduation. Students have to do everything on their own, they don't even give us a college degree on time.
content.Infrastructure: The college is too old and hasn't undergone renovation. The hostel rooms are so small, 4 people are staying in 1 room in the girls' hostel, which is not good. The lab equipment is either not working or missing, and there are no medical facilities for students. The classrooms are also dirty. It's not so good what I'll say.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc.(Hons.) in Horticulture - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college ever.

content.Placements: This college's name is the College of Horticulture. This college provides 100% placements. The highest package is 10 LPA. Our college provides talented students with ability jobs. Students do very hard work. They are responsible to make sure success in life.
content.Infrastructure: This college offers a B.Sc. in Hons Horticulture. In the first semester, students will take 11 courses. Exams are divided into two parts: mid-term and end-term. We have Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, comfortable classrooms, and the best library. The hostel is well-maintained, with 24-hour electricity and security.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Ranchi Agriculture College has good campus environment.

content.Placements: Only 5% of students which is around 4-5 students get selected. Banks like PNB, ICICI, and HDFC come to campus. An agriculture loan officer and clerk role is offered by JNR Bank. The salary package offered is 5 LPA. Our college provides 6 months of prior training with a stipend of approximately Rs. 6,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: There is a Wi-Fi-enabled library with more than 20,00 books and daily newspapers in both English and Hindi. There are football and cricket grounds and basketball and badminton courts. Classrooms have smartboards and Wi-Fi. Labs are equipped with all the accessories and Wi-Fi. The campus has its hospital with basic amenities. Canteens and mess are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc.(Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college is the best because it gives more output with less resources .

content.Placements: 50% of the students are placed from my college. The highest package of my college is 5 Lacs. Kheti, TCS, is a fertilizer and pesticide company recruiting. Many students qualify government exams like NABARD, IBPS, AFO, and Krishi Vigyan Kendra. 99% of students go for higher education by qualifying ICAR PG in all over India.
content.Infrastructure: For each course, a separate lab is available. Good Wi-Fi system in academic building. Sufficient classrooms are available; each book of available courses is present in the library; separate study rooms are available for students with Wi-Fi facilities. Mess food is not good, but canteen food is good. There is a medical facility in the hostel; if emergencies occur, they will provide an ambulance van. A sports complex is present, and sports equipment is also available. Each year, TMPL is held in our college. Also, cultural programs are organised on different occasions.

admission_overview.college_name: Birsa Agriculture University Admission 2025: Fee, Dates, Eligibility & Application

paragraphs: BAU Ranchi admissionsare primarily entrance-based. The university conducts an entrance exam for admission to PG and doctoral courses. For UG programmes, the universityCombined Competitive Entrance Examinationconductedby I.C.A.R. V.C.I.at All India level and through theJharkhand Combined Competitive Entrance Examination Board. Birsa Agricultural University offers UG, PG and doctoral courses in multiple streams such as Agriculture, Science, Veterinary, etc. Interested candidates can apply online on the official website of BAU.

Birsa Agricultural University admission cycle begins inMaywith the opening of registration. Candidates can visit the official website of the university to apply for the preferred course. Below are keyBAU Ranchi admissionhighlights:
Particulars
BAU Ranchi Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
https://www.bauranchi.org/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Birsa Agricultural University admissions are based on entrance exam score. The minimum eligibility for all UG courses is Class 12 whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. Below are eligibility and selection criteria for topBAU Ranchi courses:

Birsa Agricultural University fee varies course-wise. The fee include multiple components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, hostel fee, etc. Some of the fee components are charged one-time, while some have to be paid semester-wise or annually, such as tuition fees. Find below BAU Ranchi fee for top courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
Birsa Agricultural University seat intake is defined for each course. Out of the total intake some are reserved for reserved category candidates. Below is BAU Ranchi seat intake for top courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Birsa Agriculture University admissions are based on university or state-level entrance exams. Candidates need to fulfil all the eligibility and selection requirements to apply for admission. Below is step-wise BAU Ranchi admission process:
STEP 1: BAU Ranchi Application Process 2025

Aspirants can download the application form online from the university website and submit it along with the specified documents and a non-refundable application fee of INR 1,500 (INR 750 for SC/ ST) for PG courses.
STEP 2: Selection

The university selects candidates for UG courses throughCombined Competitive Entrance Examination conducted by I.C.A.R. V.C.I.andJharkhand Combined Competitive Entrance Examination Board, Ranchi. The university conducts an entrance exam for PG and doctoral courses. The university prepares a merit list based on entrance test. The minimum cutoff marks for PG courses is 50% for General/ EWS/ OBC and 40% for SC/ ST/ PC)
STEP 3: Seat Allotment & Admission Confirmation

Once the selection is over, candidates are offered a seat in their preferred course.15%of the total seats are filled by a Combined Competitive Entrance Examination conducted by I.C.A.R. V.C.I. at All India level and85%of the total seats are filled by Jharkhand Combined Competitive Entrance Examination Board, Ranchi. For PG courses, the seats are offered based on the entrance exam conducted by the university. About 50% of the seats are reserved for students belonging from Jharkhand. Selected candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the university.
For more information about BAU - Birsa Agricultural University Admission Process check out the below video:

Such aspirants need to complete their bachelor's degree with at least 55% aggregate.

placement_data.title: BAU Ranchi Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The University has not released the 2023 placement statistics. However, the NIRF report 2023 is out. According to the report, 27 BSc/ BTech, 4 BVSc, and 30 PG (2-year) students were placed during BAU Ranchi placements 2022. The median package offered to BSc/ BTech and BVSc students were INR 6.40 LPA and INR 7.50 LPA , respectively. For PG (2-year) courses, the median package during Birsa Agricultural University placements 2022 stood at INR 8.09 LPA .

faqs.question: How is the placement of Birsa Agricultural University Ranchi?
faqs.answer: The official placement report has not been disclosed as of now. As per the details fetched from the NIRF report, 31 UG and 30 PG students were placed during the 2022 drive. The median package offered to PG (2-year) students was the highest and the amount stood at INR 8.09 LPA. Check the complete insights of Birsa Agricultural University placements 2022 from the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2022) Total students (BSc/ BTech) 330 Students placed (BSc/ BTech) 27 Median package (BSc/ BTech) INR 6.40 LPA Total students (BVSc) 28 Students placed (BVSc) 4 Median package (BVSc) INR 7.50 LPA Total students (PG-2 year) 113 Students placed (PG-2 year) 30 Median package (PG-2 year) INR 8.09 LPA NOTE: The above details are fetched from the NIRF report 2023.

faqs.question: What are the government job profiles available for BSc graduates?
faqs.answer: Because of their prestige, job security, competitive pay, and enticing benefits, public sector jobs are still in high demand in India. With a bachelor's degree in science, a candidate can apply for a wide range of public sector positions that complement their technical expertise and analytical abilities. A bachelor's degree in any scientific field opens doors to research jobs at national labs and institutes. For BSc graduates, the following are some common government job profiles : Government Job Profiles for BSc Graduates Research Scientist Clinical Research Specialist Lab Technician Biochemist Assistant Nurse Forest Department- IFS Officer FCI- Trainee RBI Grade B Officer LIC- AAO SBI PO Note: The information is sourced from external sites and may vary.

faqs.question: What is the median package offered to BSc (H) students of Birsa Agricultural University?
faqs.answer: As per the BAU Ranchi NIRF report 2023, the median package offered to UG (four year) places students stood at INR 6.40 LPA . The total students who participated in the drive were 330. Out of this, 27 students were placed . It must be noted that the mentioned placements data is not specific to BSc (H) course. Hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: Are internships offered at BAU - Birsa Agricultural University?
faqs.answer: Students have the option of applying to internships both offline and online. However, it is not compulsory except for the veterinary students. They have a compulsory internship of 6 months. However various trainings and industrial visits are organised regularly for the students' exposure and awareness. We have a full semester dedicated for the visit of these industries and institutes.

hostel_campus.college_name: Birsa Agriculture University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: University is having altogether 14 students hostels out of which 5 are for girls while rest 9 are for boys. All the hostels are equipped with modern facilities like computer, internet, telephone, common rooms with magazines, newspapers and XV. Each hostel is having indoor game facilities. One Gym has also been provided to boys and girls hostel. In each hostel, the mess is being managed by the University and equipped with modern essential items. Recently, two rooms in each hostel have been furnished, one as the office of Dy. Warden while another as guest room. Each hostel is connected with the generator to ensure uninterrupted power supply.

library.description: The Birsa Agricultural University, Kanke Ranchi is University having dedicated to the promotion of Education, Research, and Extension in Agriculture, Veterinary, Forestry, and Biotechnology. The library has the collection of 13,922 books,1,604 theses,1,682 bound journals, 20 periodicals/magazines, and also reprography facilities.  It has the largest collection on Agriculture, Veterinary, Forestry and Biotechnology and allied subjects. The library is growing very fast with computers, multimedia units and various electronics gadget due to the wholehearted financial provisions of the ICAR-NATP project. The library caters to the informational needs of Students, Teachers, Scientists and Research Scholars of all the educational institutions situated in Ranchi. The institute also has the facility of the digital library.

The Birsa Agricultural University, Kanke Ranchi is University having dedicated to the promotion of Education, Research, and Extension in Agriculture, Veterinary, Forestry, and Biotechnology. The library has the collection of 13,922 books,1,604 theses,1,682 bound journals, 20 periodicals/magazines, and also reprography facilities.  It has the largest collection on Agriculture, Veterinary, Forestry and Biotechnology and allied subjects. The library is growing very fast with computers, multimedia units and various electronics gadget due to the wholehearted financial provisions of the ICAR-NATP project. The library caters to the informational needs of Students, Teachers, Scientists and Research Scholars of all the educational institutions situated in Ranchi. The institute also has the facility of the digital library.

hostel.description: University is having altogether 14 students hostels out of which 5 are for girls while rest 9 are for boys. All the hostels are equipped with modern facilities like computer, internet, telephone, common rooms with magazines, newspapers and XV. Each hostel is having indoor game facilities. One Gym has also been provided to boys and girls hostel. In each hostel, the mess is being managed by the University and equipped with modern essential items. Recently, two rooms in each hostel have been furnished, one as the office of Dy. Warden while another as guest room. Each hostel is connected with the generator to ensure uninterrupted power supply.

facilities: Referral Veterinary with Advanced Diagnostic Lab
labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Aquaculture Lab, Seed Science & Technology Lab, Forest Products & Utilization Lab, Referral Veterinary with Advanced Diagnostic Lab, Audio visual and communication Lab

other_facilities: Green house, Glass house & Poly house

reviews.review_heading: Average for graduation, best for gathering life experiences, best one.
reviews.review_text: Top-notch! No doubts, the best one! The quality of the facilities of the hostel, the food quality of the hostel, and the quality of food available in the mess and canteen are the best among all departments of the university. Medical facilities are not up to the mark! Sports and games are okay, but there are no instructors!

reviews.review_heading: I would say that please use funds in the improvement of college, not improvement of own your houses.
reviews.review_text: The college is too old and hasn't undergone renovation. The hostel rooms are so small, 4 people are staying in 1 room in the girls' hostel, which is not good. The lab equipment is either not working or missing, and there are no medical facilities for students. The classrooms are also dirty. It's not so good what I'll say.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by College of Horticulture, West Singhbhum, Birsa Agricultural UniversityReviewed on 10 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best college ever.
reviews.review_text: This college offers a B.Sc. in Hons Horticulture. In the first semester, students will take 11 courses. Exams are divided into two parts: mid-term and end-term. We have Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, comfortable classrooms, and the best library. The hostel is well-maintained, with 24-hour electricity and security.

reviews.review_heading: Ranchi Agriculture College has good campus environment.
reviews.review_text: There is a Wi-Fi-enabled library with more than 20,00 books and daily newspapers in both English and Hindi. There are football and cricket grounds and basketball and badminton courts. Classrooms have smartboards and Wi-Fi. Labs are equipped with all the accessories and Wi-Fi. The campus has its hospital with basic amenities. Canteens and mess are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Tilka Manjhi Agriculture College, Godda, Birsa Agricultural UniversityReviewed on 24 Aug 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best because it gives more output with less resources .
reviews.review_text: For each course, a separate lab is available. Good Wi-Fi system in academic building. Sufficient classrooms are available; each book of available courses is present in the library; separate study rooms are available for students with Wi-Fi facilities. Mess food is not good, but canteen food is good. There is a medical facility in the hostel; if emergencies occur, they will provide an ambulance van. A sports complex is present, and sports equipment is also available. Each year, TMPL is held in ou...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by College of Horticulture, West Singhbhum, Birsa Agricultural UniversityReviewed on 30 Jul 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Horticulture College, BAU - new opportunity in Jharkhand.
reviews.review_text: As the college is newly built, the infrastructure is very new and good. The hostel is totally new. Classes are well furnished. Lab equipment is all available. All new instruments are installed. The library is also newly built, with all new books available for the Horticulture course. A mess facility is also available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: BAU glance and its functioning.
reviews.review_text: This college has a decent infrastructure, college is equipped with Wi-Fi and has a well-maintained library which is open till 10 pm for boys and 8 pm for girls. Hostel infrastructure is bad, there is a scarcity of single rooms in boy's hostels and the same in girls' hostels. But the hostel fee is very less so it is adjustable.

reviews.review_heading: Overall Good to prepare for future competitive exams.
reviews.review_text: Whole college has Wi-Fi with fast secure internet. There labs as well but don't have enough equipment which are necessary. Library is well maintained and have enough books for a whole batch for courses as well as competitive exam. Hostel is free of cost but mess is having charge.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. A gymnasium is available in our college. The food served in the mess is good. The ambulance is available 24X7. Our college has good security. The library has many books, journals, biographies, and tour experiences written by our seniors and professors. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms are equipped with air-conditioners, smart boards, and projectors.

reviews.review_heading: Good but Improvement required in the recruitment of teaching faculty.
reviews.review_text: Library facilities with free Wi-Fi, computers and Xerox facilities are available. Classrooms are equipped with smartclasses for smooth teaching. Plenty of labs available. Our hostels are equipped with gym, sports complex and the quality of food in our mess is decent. Medical facilities with ambulance are easily available. Every year annual sports meet is conducted.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for UG and PG courses.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities like a hostel, Wi-Fi, etc. The lab should get improved. Medical facilities are not good. An ambulance is available in our college. You cannot play games in our college. A first aid box is available in our college. For any emergency, you have to book a van or auto because there is no driver in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the reduced number of faculty members and the lack of placements.
reviews.review_text: It has one of the best infrastructures among the government institutes. There is a well-managed hostel with better facilities. Sports facilities are available. A good playground on which two games can be played at a time is available. There are air-conditioned lecture halls.

reviews.review_heading: Ranchi veterinary college, single government college in Jharkhand for pursuing veterinary course.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in the college laboratory are good and below average. Hostels are well maintained with spacious rooms, tables, chairs, cupboards, beds, etc. Each hostel has mess facilities with a canteen in boys' hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Great teachers have experience in practical but there is lack of teachers in our college.
reviews.review_text: Everything in the hostel and college is up to the mark. Our hostel and college have Wi-Fi. The labs are well-equipped with chemicals and proper materials which we require in the laboratory. The library contains our course-related and other useful books. The hostel is well-equipped with generator, washing machine, RO water purifier, and well maintained and hygienic hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Birsa Agricultural University.
reviews.review_text: Classroom is well maintained with a smart class, laboratory facility and all types of machinery are available in the department. All the facilities are available at the hostel like a generator, fully furnished rooms with attached bathroom, refrigerator, water cooler, etc. In some hostels, there are air-conditioners also.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about BAU - Birsa Agricultural University
