reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college for the homeopathy course.

review_content.Placements: The quality of graduates is fine here. The institute is one of the best institutes in the country for homeopathy, and the selection is based solely on NEET. After graduation, most of the students either get good college for higher studies or set up their clinic, which runs well overall.
review_content.Infrastructure: Accommodation is available for both girls and boys on the campus itself. Mess charges are very affordable, but the quality of food served is below average. The campus has a football ground, basketball, and volleyball court. There is no canteen, but you can always go out to have snacks and tea. Tea stalls are available right outside the campus, so that covers up the absence of a canteen.

reviews_list.batch_info: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Best homeopathic college in Asia, infrastructure, patient flow.

review_content.Placements: There was no such package as such, after college you need to give AIAPGET exam to pursue MD degree. Other than that you could practice in your place. One must study from here to get to know the amount of knowledge you gather from the place due to its patient flow.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure was outstanding. There was G+7 floor academic building. There was a big playground with basketball and volleyball courts. Boys and girls hostels were available. It would be a waste of time to talk about infrastructure as there was no other BHMS college in the entire Asia who was having better infrastructure than NIH, Kolkata.

content.Placements: There are 126 seats and the course is 5 and a half years long, with 4 semesters and a 1-year internship. The fee per year is only Rs 20,500, and the hostel fee is Rs 6,000 per year. The hospital has 3,000-4,000 patients per day in homoeopathy, which is hard to believe. Even first-year students take care of patients.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at NIH is good. There are labs, classrooms, and a library, but no wifi for students. Classes are from 9am to 5pm. We don't get a hostel room in your first year, but we might get one if we are admitted in 2024. The mess is good, and sports facilities are available.

review_summary.college_name: S.S. Jain Subodh PG College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty, good placements in the last years.

content.Placements: My college is S. Jain Subodh PG College, Rambagh Circle, Jaipur, Rajasthan. In my college, the students placed by companies is 30-32%. The highest package is approximately 12 LPA, the lowest is 3.5 LPA, and the average package is 6.5 LPA from all companies. My course internship percentage is 60%. The top role is HR in their company.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus is very attractive and provides a good environment for students. The classrooms are new, there are labs for every subject or course, and a good Wi-Fi connection for students, along with a modern library with full resources. A hostel is managed by the college samiti with a good environment. The college holds many sports and games at the district level. The canteen is good with pure food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The best college in Jaipur for student who wants to do their graduation and also post graduation.

content.Placements: Our college gives opportunities to students for placement in the final year and even 4th sem students can try just by making a CV and the college had a personalized WhatsApp group from which they inform students. Almost 60 percent of those who were interested in jobs got their placement.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides excellent infrastructure and the classes were good. Labs for Physics and Chemistry were in very good condition with each and every instrument that we needed.
content.Faculty: Teachers were always helpful and they never decline to answer any questions asked. Teachers take classes on a regular basis and if we study the classes properly, almost 75 percent of the paper comes from the notes of teachers who had taught in the lecture, so there was not much difficulty in clearing the semester exam. It was relevant for the course curriculum .

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: S.S. Jain Subodh College provides really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: I don't know which students in my class are placed. The average package is 4.5 LPA. College staff are friendly to all students. All information is known to every student in our college. The students get internships. The percentage is 67%, but I don't know which companies appoint them. The highest is H. R.
content.Infrastructure: Courses in the college are peaceful and simple for a student to understand. Our college provides the best facilities. It includes Wi-Fi, well-equipped classrooms, and a student library. The hostel has many facilities provided by the college department. The canteen serves good food.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: An academic powerhouse with A+ prestige and great infrastructure with placement support.

content.Placements: There are approximately 67% students who are placed. The highest package is around 8 LPA. Banks and other automotive companies recruit from our college. 70% of students got internships from our course in automotive companies and the banking industry. Students directly take their degrees on the basis of internships.
content.Infrastructure: There is a library, conference hall, and AC classrooms. There are the best quality facilities of water and sanitation. There are lots of departments of different streams. All the rooms are in good condition, and the office processes are systematic. There is a fan in every room, and they are working properly. The building maintenance is done by the college staff every year, such as denting and painting.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in English - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good curriculum, good staff, good infrastructure and a phenomenal library.

content.Placements: Students got placed in my visionity are around 56 percent and the highest package for fresher is 6.7 LPA. There are many companies to apply for. Mainly jobs for bank, airways, travel companies, and other data management companies and MNC are here to recruit students.
content.Infrastructure: Classroom, labs, and Wi-Fi is good, but the library of our college is phenomenal. It has got very niche works of my subject as well as other subjects. My subject is English Literature. I have got a total of 5 papers in my final year exams. They are exceptional.

admission_process.title: S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College admissions 2025 is open. The college is affiliated with theUniversity of Rajasthan, Jaipur.S.S. Jain Subodh Pg Collegeoffers various UG, PG, PhD and diploma courses in the fields of Engineering, Business Administration, Computer Science and others, such as BCA, BBA, MSc, and many more, along with a few diploma courses. Admission to all the courses is merit-based. Further, for admission to PhD, candidates are required to apply and appear in RTU DAT test. Candidates looking for admission are advised to read the below article to know more about S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College admission 2025, along with course-wise eligibility and selection criteria:

S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College admission to all the courses is merit-based. However, for admission to PhD university accepts RTU DAT entrance exam scores. Admission to all UG, PG, diploma and PhD courses is open. Candidates who meet the minimum eligibility criteria for the respective course. Additionally, must appear for the entrance exam for admission to PhD courses. The table below lists courses offered at S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College courses eligibility along with their accepted entrance exams, & selection process:

S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College admission process contains various steps that are required to be followed by the candidate to get admission. The admission process begins with filling out the application form, applying, and appearing for the entrance exam accepted by the college. The last step is to submit theS.S. Jain Subodh Pg College course feefor final seat confirmation. Given below is the step-by-step S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College admission process 2025:
Step 1: S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College Application Process

Candidates interested in admission to any courses at the college are required to fulfil the eligibility and selection criteria set by the college. After that, candidates must fill out the application form online by visiting the official website of the college.
Step 2: S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College Selection Round

Satya Institute of Technology and Management offers entrance and merit-based admission to all the courses. Additionally, to get admission, candidates are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria, i.e., passClass 10and Class 12, for admission to the UG course. Further, for admission to PG courses, candidates are required to pass a graduation degree from a recognised board. Further, for admission to diploma courses, candidates are required to pass Class 12 from a recognised board to get direct admission. Additionally, candidates must fulfil the selection criteria, i.e., apply and appear forRTU DATfor admission to PhD courses.
Step 3: S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College Seat Confirmation

S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College releases the merit list based on the last qualifying exam scores. Further, for Phd the college releases a list based on entrance exam scores. After getting selected on the merit list, candidates are required to make a course fee payment within the given deadline to grab seats.

hostel_campus.college_name: S.S. Jain Subodh PG College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty, good placements in the last years.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is very attractive and provides a good environment for students. The classrooms are new, there are labs for every subject or course, and a good Wi-Fi connection for students, along with a modern library with full resources. A hostel is managed by the college samiti with a good environment. The college holds many sports and games at the district level. The canteen is good with pure food.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Jaipur for student who wants to do their graduation and also post graduation.
reviews.review_text: The college provides excellent infrastructure and the classes were good. Labs for Physics and Chemistry were in very good condition with each and every instrument that we needed.

reviews.review_heading: S.S. Jain Subodh College provides really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Courses in the college are peaceful and simple for a student to understand. Our college provides the best facilities. It includes Wi-Fi, well-equipped classrooms, and a student library. The hostel has many facilities provided by the college department. The canteen serves good food.

reviews.review_heading: An academic powerhouse with A+ prestige and great infrastructure with placement support.
reviews.review_text: There is a library, conference hall, and AC classrooms. There are the best quality facilities of water and sanitation. There are lots of departments of different streams. All the rooms are in good condition, and the office processes are systematic. There is a fan in every room, and they are working properly. The building maintenance is done by the college staff every year, such as denting and painting.

reviews.review_heading: Good curriculum, good staff, good infrastructure and a phenomenal library.
reviews.review_text: Classroom, labs, and Wi-Fi is good, but the library of our college is phenomenal. It has got very niche works of my subject as well as other subjects. My subject is English Literature. I have got a total of 5 papers in my final year exams. They are exceptional.

reviews.review_heading: Overall it is good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our classroom and the lab is so good and well maintained. The lab is well maintained and lab facilities are so good. The college canteen is good and the food is also good and hygiene. Sports and games are also conducted by college .

reviews.review_heading: If you want a degree go to any college, but if you want to become worthy, come to our college.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good facilities and the classrooms are cleaned and all the required books are available in the library. The college does not have its own hostel, but the canteen food is really good and there are almost all sports activities available.

reviews.review_heading: I want to recommend this for B.Sc/B.A./B.Com because the teaching quality is very good.
reviews.review_text: The classroom infrastructure is okay, not great. Wi-Fi is not available here. However, the library has good infrastructure and a peaceful environment. There are no college hostels available here, but many PGs are situated in this area, so you do not have to face hostel problems.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is supportive and the campus life is balanced and vibrant.
reviews.review_text: This college has pretty spacious classrooms, a well-stocked library, labs, and sports facilities. The canteen is satisfactory but needs improvement. There are no hostels. The digital infrastructure is limited but sufficient to provide a quality education. There is no Wi-Fi. The furniture is mediocre.

reviews.review_heading: Review of my college life.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good, and library is also a good place to study, classrooms are well-equipped with air conditioning. Also, there are good medical facilities, mess quality is okay, like it can be eaten, not very tasty, but okay types, and also you can play cricket.

reviews.review_heading: It is a nice college for studies and graduation. It offers an affordable fee for any courses.
reviews.review_text: Nice infrastructure is available in our college. The college has a cafeteria and a sitting area near it, which provides tasty and hygienic food. There is a library and Wi-Fi facility in labs. Facilities for games and sports are also there. Classrooms are also nice and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and helpful faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Digital classroom, enlarged library, hi-tech labs, etc., were the qualities of Subodh. Canteen and medical facilities were also available. Hostels were clean and tidy always and time to time maintained by the staffs. Mess and canteen food were tasty and eatable not like other colleges. More of that we always enjoyed with our friends in hostel rooms. Sports academy like cricket, football, and badminton were also very great because of infrastructure and experienced coaches.

reviews.review_heading: S. S. Jain Subodh PG College review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities were good. But when it comes to the hostel, it was very old and was going to be demolished soon, with a new hostel set to be built with more capacity. In the hostel, you will get all the facilities like Wi-Fi. This college offered various facilities to its students like a cyber library open 21 hours from 8:00 AM to 5:00 AM, free bus service covering hostels and all faculty members. It also provided free medical facilities at the University Hospital, etc.

reviews.review_heading: My college life in a small paragraph.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is better compared to any other college. Whether you talk about classrooms, parking areas, the library, or labs are all good and well-maintained. As per the requirement and necessity, changes are made annually. There is no Wi-Fi facility in the college. There are no hostels in our college, in fact, you have to find one as near as possible to the college.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very excellent and has a very good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: S. jain subhodh PG college was very good, first time was go in my college I was shocked it was very big actually I belong to village so I was shocked I was seen first time big buildings so. In my college different buildings for different department. College placed on one of the best location called rambagh of Jaipur city around 300m near the sms stadium, moti dungri, rambagh palace, birla mandir, Even albert hall museum also near by college. In my college a very big and excellent library, a cant...

Alva's College of Naturopathy and Yogic Science popular courses include BNYS and MD. The College offers these courses in full-time mode for the duration of 3 years to 5 years. Furthermore, the eligibility criteria for admission to BNYS requires Class 12 qualification with a minimum aggregate of 45% along with valid scores in NEET.
For admission to MD, candidates must qualify BNYS with a minimum aggregate of 50% from a recognised university. ACNYS BNYS curriculum includes clinical training in various institutions, clinics and hospitals. review_content.Placements: More than 90 % of the passed-out students are placed in different healthcare sectors all over India. Along with post-graduation, there are more opportunities like cruiser ship health employees, acupuncturists, physical trainers, and nutritionists, in highly reputed companies. On average, 60% of graduates got internships in different health care centers and national institutes of naturopathy in Pune. Top roles offered by BNYS are medical officer, doctor, nutritionist, acupuncturist, physical trainer etc.

The College fee structure consists of tuition fees, one-time payment, hostel fees among others. Therefore, candidates must enquire about the same from the campus.

content.Placements: More than 90 % of the passed-out students are placed in different healthcare sectors all over India. The packages start from the lowest of about 10 LPA and 18 LPA at its highest. Government medical colleges and hospitals across India are where most of the candidates are working. Along with post-graduation, there are more opportunities like cruiser ship health employees, acupuncturists, physical trainers, and nutritionists, in highly reputed companies. On average, 60% of graduates got internships in different health care centers and national institutes of naturopathy in Pune. Top roles offered by BNYS are medical officer, doctor, nutritionist, acupuncturist, physical trainer etc.

admission_process.title: Alva's College of Naturopathy and Yogic Science Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Alva's College of Naturopathy and Yogic Science admissionis both merit and entrance-based for courses offered at UG and PG levels. Candidates can apply for admission BNYS and MD programmes at the official website ofAlva's College of Naturopathy and Yogic Science. For BNYS, candidates must pass Class 12 in the relevant stream. However, for MD programme, candidates need to appear and qualify for MD entrance exam. Candidates interested in Alva's College of Naturopathy and Yogic Science admission can check the fees and other details below:

Alva's College of Naturopathy and Yogic Science course admissionsare offered to eligible students. The college offers UG and PG courses in various specialisations. Candidates need to meet the basic eligibility requirements for their desired programme. Tabulated below are the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related toAlva's College of Naturopathy and Yogic Science course:
- Pass Class 12 with minimum 45% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry & Biology (40% aggregate for SC/ ST & category)
- The minimum age limit must be17 years

Alva's College of Naturopathy and Yogic Science admission process begins with online registrations, followed by selection rounds and fee payment to conclude the admission steps. Mentioned below are all the steps in detail:
Step 1: Application Process

The application process at Alva's College of Naturopathy and Yogic Science is conducted in both online and offline modes. Candidates can get the application form from the college's official website and submit it to the admission office with a demand draft of INR 1,000.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Alva's College of Naturopathy and Yogic Science admissions are both merit and entrance-based. For admission to BNYS programme, candidates are admitted based on their academic of the last qualifying exam. Moreover, admission to MD is done based on a valid NEET PG score.
Step 3: Final Admission
After the completion of the selection rounds, the selected candidates must pay a certain amount of course fee to confirm their admission.

college_info.intro:
Quantum University comprises of 8 departments, including Technology, Agriculture, Media, Health Sciences, Law, and others. BTech, BSc, and MBA are among the most popular programmes offered at the university.
Quantum University Roorkee offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech programme offered at the university covers core courses in the areas of CSE, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, and others. After pursuing BTech, students can work as Web Developers, Data Science Engineer, Automotive Developers, Robotics Engineer, and others. Below-mentioned are Quantum University's popular programmes:
Check out more on Quantum University courses in the below video:

placements.overview: Quantum University placements 2025 have not been released yet. The University has released the placement 2024 stats on its official website. As per the details, 192 companies visited the University campus in 2024 and placed 872 students. The highest package offered during Quantum University placements 2024 was INR 33.50 LPA and the average package stood at INR 7.20 LPA. The list of recruiters included Oracle, Adobe, Capgemini, and many others.

faqs.answer: A:    The University has a decent placement record. During the 2025 placements, 872 students were placed in 192 companies that visited the campus. reviews_list.review_title: Quantum University is the best university in the Roorkee area.

review_content.Placements: The highest placement percentage is 85 percent, the maximum package is not more than 2.5 LPA, companies like Arvind Fashion, Tata Consultancy, Amardeep Design, Yacca, Pritam Pvt. Ltd., and Asian East West Pharma visit the campus, and I completed an Internshala online course in Business Intelligence and Data Analytics with 60 percent.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available for students. Classrooms are good. Libraries are good, with books and a computer library. Every department has its own library. There is a quite good facility in the hostel. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is normal, and medical facilities are also good. Sports and games are not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Quantum University.

review_content.Placements: Quantum University was one of the best universities in Uttarakhand that provided good quality education with good placements every year. The placement percentage of Quantum University was above 80%. More than 70 companies visited the university every year for jobs. Many reputed companies were Tata, HCL, and TCS.
review_content.Infrastructure: Quantum University provided good hostel facility. In this facility, they provided food, lodging, laundry, Wi-Fi, gym, and 24-hour security. University also provided good sports facility. University did not charge any extra amount for this. University provided interdisciplinary education.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the BCA course.

review_content.Placements: 70-80 percent of students got placed. According to me, 50 percent of students got placements. The average package ranges from 2.5-3 LPA. Top roles offered are software developer, QA analyst, SEO, etc. Companies like TCS visit the pool placements. Not many IT companies visit, but many sales companies give good placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi works relatively slowly, but new 5G routers are now being installed in hostel labs and on the campus for faster speeds. There are two libraries in the college. The old one is a little bit bigger than the new library. It has sufficient books, but the new one has business-related books.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for MBA at Quantum University?
overview_faqs.answer: Quantum University doesn't explicitly publish the exact fees for their MBA programme on their website butTuition: The first and second years of the MBA programme may cost approximately INR 1.32 Lacs per year in tuition.Extra Charges:Exam fees for universities: These can differ a little from year to year, but they should be about INR 6,500 for first year and INR 6,000 for second year.Resource Material Fee, Insurance, etc.: The annual cost could be approximately INR 45,000.Optional hostel costs: These can range from INR 40,000 to 52,000 year, depending on the type of room you choose if you decide to stay in the hostel.

overview_faqs.question: What is the application fee for NID DAT?
overview_faqs.answer: The application fee of NID DAT 2026 for the B. Des for General, General-EWS, OBC-NCL candidates is INR 3,000. SC, ST, PwD candidates only ned to pay INR 1,500. However note that the application fees for overseas candidates seeking admission to supernumerary seats is INR 5000. In case of the M.Des programme, the application fees for General, General-EWS, OBC-NCL candidates applying for one discipline is INR 3,000. If two disciplines are chosen, the application fee is INR 6000. Meanwhile, SC, ST, PwD candidate need to pay INR 1,500 for one discipline, and INR 3000 for two disciplines.The NID DAT 2026 application form is now open.

review_summary.college_name: Quantum University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Quantum University.

content.Placements: Quantum holds a record of more than 85 percent of the batch students getting placed through campus placements, and in our course, it is 90 percent. The highest package offered is 7 LPA for BPT, and the average package ranges from 3-4 LPA. The college has tie-ups with many private hospitals nearby in Dehradun, Haridwar, and Rishikesh.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure in Quantum University is good, according to the fees and all. Buildings are well furnished. Labs are well-equipped, and classrooms are well-maintained. Libraries are well updated with books. Hostels are also quite good. It also provides a mess, laundry, gym, Wi-Fi, and many sports facilities in the hostel. Food is quite good in taste and full of variety.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Quantum is the best choice I have ever made.

content.Placements: I am still pursuing the course here, but more than 85 percent of the batch gets placement through campus placement. The highest package was 7 LPA last year, and the average was 4 LPA. Many private hospital recruit from our college. The students, after getting placed in many hospitals, chose their careers according to their preferences.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure, facilities, such as buildings, labs, and classrooms are very well maintained and well-equipped with the latest updates. Hostel is offered with many facilities like mess, gym, laundry, Wi-Fi, and many sports facilities. The mess is very hygienic and clean, and the food is so good.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Business intelligence and Analytics Collaboration with Samartrix - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Quantum University is the best university in the Roorkee area.

content.Placements: The highest placement percentage is 85 percent, the maximum package is not more than 2.5 LPA, companies like Arvind Fashion, Tata Consultancy, Amardeep Design, Yacca, Pritam Pvt. Ltd., and Asian East West Pharma visit the campus, and I completed an Internshala online course in Business Intelligence and Data Analytics with 60 percent.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available for students. Classrooms are good. Libraries are good, with books and a computer library. Every department has its own library. There is a quite good facility in the hostel. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is normal, and medical facilities are also good. Sports and games are not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Quantum University.

content.Placements: Quantum University was one of the best universities in Uttarakhand that provided good quality education with good placements every year. The placement percentage of Quantum University was above 80%. More than 70 companies visited the university every year for jobs. Many reputed companies were Tata, HCL, and TCS.
content.Infrastructure: Quantum University provided good hostel facility. In this facility, they provided food, lodging, laundry, Wi-Fi, gym, and 24-hour security. University also provided good sports facility. University did not charge any extra amount for this. University provided interdisciplinary education.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the BCA course.

content.Placements: 70-80 percent of students got placed. According to me, 50 percent of students got placements. The average package ranges from 2.5-3 LPA. Top roles offered are software developer, QA analyst, SEO, etc. Companies like TCS visit the pool placements. Not many IT companies visit, but many sales companies give good placements.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi works relatively slowly, but new 5G routers are now being installed in hostel labs and on the campus for faster speeds. There are two libraries in the college. The old one is a little bit bigger than the new library. It has sufficient books, but the new one has business-related books.

faqs.question: Can I open a clinic after completing a BPharm degree from Quantum University?
faqs.answer: No, students are not allowed to open a clinic after completing the BPharm degree from Qunatum University. According to PCI (Pharmacy Council of India), pharmacist are not eligible to open their own clinics. To start the clinic, a person should be a holder of an MBBS degree. Without an MBBS degree, no one can operate a clinic or even prescribe medicine to patients. However, after completing the BPharm degree, graduates are eligible to obtain a license for the chemist/medicine shop. A pharmacist s

faqs.question: Is MBA admission at Quantum University merit-based or entrance-based?
faqs.answer: For admissions to the MBA course at Quantum University, the university accepts the scores of alidCAT/CMAT/MAT/XAT/NMAT/ University entrance examscores will give preference to and GD/ PI/ Cleared University examination.Additionally, a minimum aggregate of 50% is required in Class 12 and graduation for the MBA course. However, the merit cutoff may vary each academic year. Therefore, Quantum University does accept the scores of entrance examinations for admission to the MBA course.

faqs.question: Is CUET compulsory for admissions to BA LLB courses at Quantum University?
faqs.answer: Quantum University/Quantum School of Law may take CUET UG scores for admission to the BA LLB course. Also, the admission eligibility for BA LLB courses is that candidates should pass Class 12 with a minimum aggregate of 50%, and CUET UG score acceptance is not specified on the official university website. However, Quantum University does provide scholarships based on CUET performance for entry into several undergraduate programmes, such as BA LLB.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to MBA at Quantum School of Business Quantum University?
faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for admission to the MBA programme at Quantum School of Business, Quantum University, is a graduate degree of a minimum three-year duration from any stream with a minimum of 50% marks. The admission to the MBA programme is based on valid scores in the University-accepted entrance exams like CAT/MAT/XAT/NMAT or merit scores in Class 12. The university conducts an Entrance cum Scholarship Exam called Q-Care for Admission.

faqs.question: When will be CUET UG exam conducted?
faqs.answer: CUET UG 2026 exam will be conducted in May/June for 37 subjects. The mode of examination isCBT (Computer Based Test). NTA did not release official notification for CUET UG date sheet. Candidates can know exam details through CUET UG information bulletin. NTA will conduct CUET UG 2026 exam in multiple phases depending upon the number of candidates registering for the exam. Registered candidates can know the exact CUET UG exam on hall ticket. Candidates will have to report at the alloted exam centre on the day of the examination. The exam will be held in two slots each day depending upon the subject combinations chosen by the candidate.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for BBA course at Quantum University?
faqs.answer: Quantum University offers a BBA at the UG level in the specialisations of general and BBA in Business intelligence and Analytics Collaboration with Samartrix. Moreover, the university also offers an integrated BBA + MBA course in Family Business Management for the duration of five years.Candidates who are interested in pursuing their bachelor's at the university can apply to the programme as per their eligibility in either online or offline mode. Students have to pay a registration fee ofINR 1,200to complete the application process. Additionally, this application fee is non-refundable.

placement_report.college_name: Quantum University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: Quantum University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The University has released its placement statistics on its official website, regardless of the year. Hence, considering it for 2025. As per the details, the highest and average packages offered during Quantum University placements in 2025 stood at INR 33.5 LPA and INR 7.20 LPA , respectively. Further, over 192 recruiters visited the Quantum University in 2025 and placed 872 students of the 2025 batch. The top recruiters of Quantum University in 2025 included Amazon, Oracle, Adobe, Capgemini, IBM, and others .

Quantum University has a placement cell which is responsible for securing lucrative career opportunities for students. The institute invites companies from different sectors to conduct the placement process at the Campus premises.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Quantum University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in Quantum University is good, according to the fees and all. Buildings are well furnished. Labs are well-equipped, and classrooms are well-maintained. Libraries are well updated with books. Hostels are also quite good. It also provides a mess, laundry, gym, Wi-Fi, and many sports facilities in the hostel. Food is quite good in taste and full of variety.

reviews.review_heading: Quantum is the best choice I have ever made.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure, facilities, such as buildings, labs, and classrooms are very well maintained and well-equipped with the latest updates. Hostel is offered with many facilities like mess, gym, laundry, Wi-Fi, and many sports facilities. The mess is very hygienic and clean, and the food is so good.

reviews.review_heading: Quantum University is the best university in the Roorkee area.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available for students. Classrooms are good. Libraries are good, with books and a computer library. Every department has its own library. There is a quite good facility in the hostel. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is normal, and medical facilities are also good. Sports and games are not good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Quantum University.
reviews.review_text: Quantum University provided good hostel facility. In this facility, they provided food, lodging, laundry, Wi-Fi, gym, and 24-hour security. University also provided good sports facility. University did not charge any extra amount for this. University provided interdisciplinary education.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the BCA course.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi works relatively slowly, but new 5G routers are now being installed in hostel labs and on the campus for faster speeds. There are two libraries in the college. The old one is a little bit bigger than the new library. It has sufficient books, but the new one has business-related books.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Quantum School of Health Sciences (Admission Office)
reviews.review_heading: Life at Quantum University Roorkee is full of new experiences and lessons.
reviews.review_text: Quantum provides very nice facilities and a good infrastructure on the campus. The location and surroundings are peaceful and beautiful. All the facilities like Wi-Fi, classrooms, and a library are well-furnished and maintained with well-equipped labs. The mess and canteen of the college are one of the best places where I feel like a second home. Everything is just so good, clean, and pure in every aspect.

reviews.review_heading: Quantum University review.
reviews.review_text: In the name of facilities and infrastructure, my college is not upto the mark in my course/department. They don't provide Wi-Fi, and there are no fixed classrooms in my course. The library is quite good. Hostel facilities are average. Sports and games are limited.

reviews.review_heading: This is a good university because it provides me with good memories, good placement, and good friend
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus is also very good. The Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are also available. Every facility is good. The mess facilities are also available, and the food is good in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: Quantum University is one of the best universities.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is the most memorable part of college life for the students. At Quantum, world class hostels are not just about buildings, but are the core of every culture. Providing a very secure and fun filled environment that makes the student feel quite at home.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with my decision of choosing Quantum.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well-equipped. Classrooms are fully furnished, well-equipped, and libraries are very well maintained. In hostels, rooms are well furnished with a separate bed, table, chair, cupboard, and fan too. Hostel food is quite good in taste, and the menu is full of variety.

reviews.review_heading: Quantum University offers knowledge and skills.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was quite good. Along with a hygienic environment. The college provided all facilities such as a library, Wi-Fi, labs, and a well-structured building. A great cafeteria for both students and teachers. The food quality was also very good.

reviews.review_heading: Quantum University is the best private university.
reviews.review_text: Hostel infrastructure included furnished rooms such as single and double sharing. Basic facilities like beds, study tables, and cupboards were provided. Along with common facilities. Many hostels also offered security, laundry services, and medical facilities. Each room typically had a bed, a mattress, a study table, and other necessary furniture. Everything was good, and Quantum University was very good. Facilities of the college were great.

reviews.review_heading: Learning experience in Quantum.
reviews.review_text: Quantum University has a library included in the fee structure. They issue a card for the library, and you can take the books you want using that card. They also provide hostel facilities, but I didn’t opt for that as I am a local person from Saharanpur, so I used to commute daily, which was more cost-effective for me.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Quantum University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Quantum University in my course B.Tech (hons) cybersecurity is not good at all. There is no Wi-Fi service and even in a training session which is a collaboration with Quick Heal academy. If we work on the system they told us to take your laptop.

reviews.review_heading: Review of my course in Quantum University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Quantum University is not up to the mark. And for our course it provides average facilities of lab and Wi-Fi. If we want to work in college systems, they tell us to take our laptop to do this kind of work. And their systems run very slow.

paragraphs: The total fee for the MBA programme at Quantum University is:
1. For outside Uttrakhand region students:
2. For Uttrakhand region students
Total Fee includes security, tution fee, books, university exam fee, resource material and insurance.
Scholarships for CUET Candidates
Students on their satisfactory performance in the Q-Care examination shall be eligible for the grant of following merit scholarships:

To reward brilliant minds perform well in their JEE Mains examination, Quantum University offers scholarships based on their JEE (Mains) rank. Since its inception, University has helped over a thousand JEE Mains rank-holders who deserved world-class education but had financial constraints.

Quantum University believes that money should not be a roadblock for a student having desire for world-class education in his heart. Those who do not appear in Q-Care examination but scores well in their class XII board examination are eligible for the grant of following merit scholarships:

Quantum School of Business, Quantum University offers scholarships based on Q-Care Exam scores, Class 12 board exam scores, and entrance exam scores such as CAT/MAT/XAT/NMAT. For instance, students who score 80% and above in Class 12 board exams or Q-Care Exam are eligible for a 100% scholarship on tuition fees in the first year. Additionally, students with a valid score in CAT/MAT/XAT/NMAT are given preference for MBA admission. The university conducts an Entrance cum Scholarship Exam called Q-Care for Admission, which forms the basis of eligibility for some courses and for scholarships for most of the programs.

college_info.intro:
Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University's flagship programmes are BSc, BTech, and MBA. The institute offers a three-year BSc programme across various specialisations such as Forensic Science, Cardiovascular Technology, Medical Microbiology, and Fashion Design.
APG Shimla University is one of the eminent universities. The university offers an MBA specialisation in HR, Marketing, IB, Finance, and others. The BTech programme offered by Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University is a four-year CSE, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering. The below-mentioned are Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University's popular programmes:

placements.overview: Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University placements 2025 has not been released yet. The university has 100% job placement and job assistance offered to the students. The university offers internship opportunities to the students with a monthly stipend of INR 10,000. During, APG Shimla University placements, the highest package is INR 25.7 and starting salary is INR 3.6 LPA- 4.6 LPA. The top recruiters are Google, SBI, ITC Hotels, Kotak, Amazon, Tata Steel, Fortune, HDFC Bank, and others.

faqs.answer: A:    Some of the top recruiters of Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University include Amazon, Tommy Hilfiger, Google, IBM, Deloitte, HDFC Bank, Amazon among many others. Placement records and package differs between various courses. You can check the official website of Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University regarding the same .
faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University?

faqs.answer: A:    The highest package offered at Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University for MBA is approximately INR 6 Lakhs per annum, the same for B.Tech is INR 5 Lakhs per annum. The packages offered are average, like most private universities here. To know more regarding the admission process, fee structure and other courses offered at Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University, refer to the official website of the institute.
faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University?

faqs.answer: A:    Fees for UG Courses like BE, B.Tech, B.Sc., LL.B., B.A.  and BBA ranges between INR 1.1 Lacs to 5 Lacs .The fees is similar to other universities in India.Students can go to the official website and enquire more about their desired courses and admission process at Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University.
faqs.question: What is the fee for UG courses at Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University?

faqs.answer: A:    Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University offers admission to courses based on the merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. The university may consider entrance exam for a few courses. Aspirants are first required to fulfil both eligibility and selection requirements to apply for a programme at APG Shimla University. Only after completion of the selection process, aspirants are offered seat in the university.
faqs.question: Can I join Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University directly?

faqs.answer: A:    Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University accepts CAT, MAT, ATMA, XAT, HPCET, HPU MAT for admission in MBA. Students can appear and quality any of these Entrance Examinations to ensure their admission in Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University.To know more about admission in Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University, Students can go through the official website of the university.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University accept for admission to MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates must complete their graduation or equivalent with at least 50% aggregate to apply for Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University MBA programme. There is a relaxation of 5% in the aggregatre for candidates belonging to the reserved category. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Forensic Science - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, it provides good academic years.

review_content.Placements: There are no direct placements in this field. We have to give government exams and interviews to secure a job. We can apply as a junior scientific officer at FSL and assistant professors at numerous universities after giving the NET exam. FSL provides internships to masters students for free or we have to pay them to train us.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good both in the university and hostels. Wi-Fi is available but it does not work. Food is okay. The forensic laboratory in the college needs more instruments. Only two canteen stores are here on the campus. The library has many books and it needs more forensic books.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Arts & Bachelor of Legislative Law (B.A. LL.B.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Its good, it had excellent environment for studying.

review_content.Placements: Placement had been highly varying for each course, but as per the international student, a lot of them had been able to be placed in a lot of companies in their respective countries, and that alone had been a story of success. Local students had also seen a sharp increase in placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure needs improvement. I find the library to be stunning and most of the classrooms as well, but my suggestion would be to modernize the classrooms to properly function as a state of the art institution. The environment of the school was really something that stands out. You can not compare it to anything. I believe its very quiet and very refreshing.

review_summary.college_name: APG Shimla University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts & Bachelor of Legislative Law (B.A. LL.B.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely supportive, the faculty pays more attention to students.

content.Placements: Being enrolled at APG, I had the opportunity to intern with the district court, high court, and private law firms. I could say our entire class got internships at the end of every semester, as it was a course requirement to do so. I'm glad I did all those internships because they prepared me.
content.Infrastructure: I can't really say a lot about hostels as I was staying in a rented apartment, but my friends who stayed in the hostel compliment the living situation of the hostels. The hostels take appropriate procedures regarding who enters and who doesn't inside the hostel, and for what purpose.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts & Bachelor of Legislative Law (B.A. LL.B.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Supportive faculty, beautiful campus, good placement.

content.Placements: Alakh Prakash Goal Shimla University has a dedicated placement cell that actively works towards providing career opportunities for students. Each year, reputed companies from various sectors visit the campus to select qualified candidates for different roles.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of university is modern and student-friendly, with Wi-Fi enabled throughout the campus and hostel too. The campus is green and scenic, enhancing the atmosphere for studying and relationships. Hostel provides comfortable accommodation with well-maintained rooms.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Forensic Science - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it provides good academic years.

content.Placements: There are no direct placements in this field. We have to give government exams and interviews to secure a job. We can apply as a junior scientific officer at FSL and assistant professors at numerous universities after giving the NET exam. FSL provides internships to masters students for free or we have to pay them to train us.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good both in the university and hostels. Wi-Fi is available but it does not work. Food is okay. The forensic laboratory in the college needs more instruments. Only two canteen stores are here on the campus. The library has many books and it needs more forensic books.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts & Bachelor of Legislative Law (B.A. LL.B.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Its good, it had excellent environment for studying.

content.Placements: Placement had been highly varying for each course, but as per the international student, a lot of them had been able to be placed in a lot of companies in their respective countries, and that alone had been a story of success. Local students had also seen a sharp increase in placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure needs improvement. I find the library to be stunning and most of the classrooms as well, but my suggestion would be to modernize the classrooms to properly function as a state of the art institution. The environment of the school was really something that stands out. You can not compare it to anything. I believe its very quiet and very refreshing.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who are placed in our course was 89%. The lowest was 76%, the highest 98% and the average was 66%. Misho, Canara Bank, Amazon, and Airtel companies recruit. 100% Management roles are offered. A lot of companies recruit students who give positive recommendations.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities, such as library and Wi-Fi, are excellent, and classrooms are of a very high standard. The quality of the hostel is that of premium, and food is of average quality for international students. The mescal and sports with games are all available.

admission_overview.college_name: APG Shimla University Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

paragraphs: APG Shimla University admissionsare primarily merit-based. The university considers the qualifying exam scores for admission to most of the courses.APGSUoffers UGC-recognised courses at UG and PG levels in multiple streams such as Engineering, Management, Arts, Journalism and Mass Communication, Hotel Management, etc. Candidates can apply online on the official website of the university forAPG Shimla University admissions.
The university offers more than 20 courses in full-time mode. Candidates can fill out the application form available on the university website. Below are the keyAPGSU admissionhighlights:
Particulars
APG Shimla University Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG & PG
How to apply?
https://apply.agu.edu.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

ForAP Goyal Shimla University admissionsto various UG & PG courses, candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, followed by the other selection rounds. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12, whereas graduation is required for PG programmes. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria forAP Goyal Shimla University admission:
Check out otherAPG Shimla University Courses

APG Shimla University admission processbegins with registration, followed by selection and admission confirmation. Candidates are first required to apply for the course of their choice. Below are the steps to get a seat in APG Shimla University:
STEP 1: APG Shimla University Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Candidates are first required to register with their personal email-id and mobile number. Aspirants also need to pay a non-refundable application fee to register for a course at APGSU.
STEP 2: Selection
Once the registration is over, candidates are selected based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. The university may also accept entrance exams for admission to specific programmes.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation & Fee Payment
The university confirms the admission to the candidates via email or message. Selected candidates need to pay theAPG Shimla University feeto confirm their seat.

courses_data.name: APG Shimla University BTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University offers a four-year BTech course divided into eight semesters. The university offers BTech inComputer Science Engineeringat the UG level. Candidates who have passed Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics with at least 45% aggregate can apply for the APG Shimla University BTech programme. There is a relaxation of 5% in the aggregate for the candidates belonging to the reserved category. Admission to BTech course is merit-based. However, the university may accept an entrance test for admission.

faqs.question: Which are the BTech specialisations offered at APG Shimla University?
faqs.answer: Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University offers four-year BTech course spread across eight semesters. Candidates after completing Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics as subjects can apply for BTech course. The university offersBTech in Computer Science Engineeringat the UG level.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to BTech at Alakh Prakash Goyal University?
faqs.answer: Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University offers admission to BTech course based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. The university may accept an entrance exam score for BTech admission. Besides, aspirants should also complete Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics with at least 45% aggregate to apply for APG Shimla University BTech course. Once selected, candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their admission in the university.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech at APG Shimla University?
faqs.answer: The total annual fee for APG Shimla University BTech isINR 6.23 lakhfor four-years Candidates need to pay course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the university. Aspirants are required to pay tuition fee as per the frequency set by the university. Besides, candidates also need to pay registration fee in the start to apply for admission.

faqs.question: Can I get admission to B.Tech at APG Shimla University without JEE Mains score?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can get admission to a B.Tech programme at APG Shimla University without JEE Mains score. The interested candidate should have scored at least 50% marks in Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics as compulsory subjects in10+2 examination. It is one of the reputed colleges in the region known for providing quality education to its students.

placement_report.college_name: APG Shimla University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: AP Goyal Shimla University Placements 2023
paragraphs: The university has not released the 2023 placement statistics yet. However, the NIRF report 2023 is released. As per the report, 29 UG and 14 PG students were placed during AP Goyal Shimla University placements 2022. The median package for UG (3-year) and UG (4-year) courses was INR 2.5 LPA . For PG courses, the median package offered during AP Goyal Shimla University placements 2022 stood at INR 2.8 LPA .

faqs.question: Does Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University offer better placements than Maharaja Agrasen University?
faqs.answer: Both the Universities are good in terms of infrastructure and faculties. However, Maharaja Agrasen University is definitely better in terms of placement records and packages. The university has a record of giving placements to more than 80 percent of students since 5 years. The package has also been decent i.e. 2.8 Lacs Per Annum - 8 Lacs Per Annum for most courses. Hence, Maharaja Agrasen University offers better placement that Andhra Pradesh Goyal Shimla University.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University?
faqs.answer: Some of the top recruiters of Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University include Amazon, Tommy Hilfiger, Google, IBM, Deloitte, HDFC Bank, Amazon among many others. Placement records and package differs between various courses. You can check the official website of Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University regarding the same .

faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University?
faqs.answer: The highest package offered at Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University for MBA is approximately INR 6 Lakhs per annum, the same for B.Tech is INR 5 Lakhs per annum. The packages offered are average, like most private universities here. To know more regarding the admission process, fee structure and other courses offered at Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University, refer to the official website of the institute.

reviews.review_text: The facilities, such as library and Wi-Fi, are excellent, and classrooms are of a very high standard. The quality of the hostel is that of premium, and food is of average quality for international students. The mescal and sports with games are all available.

reviews.review_heading: The university area is nice but have to improve something.
reviews.review_text: There are no Wi-Fi facilities in our hostel as well as in the college. Classrooms and labs are quite good. Library is also good. The hostel rooms are good but hostel food is not good and hygienic. There are no medical facilities and no pharmacy for students.

reviews.review_heading: APG Shimla University: Hilltop campus, lush greenery, modern buildings, hostels, and sports.
reviews.review_text: Although the campus is not that big it is safe and secure. The ambiance of the university is very quiet and peaceful. Furthermore, the hostel is also safe. You'll get a family here. Rooms are good, big and furnished. Food available in a mess sometimes upsets your stomach but that's able to eat (truth). The infrastructure of the university and hostel is beautiful, especially library. Classrooms are facilitated with projectors, good lighting, and good desks. You can connect yourself with mother na...

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, decent placements, and a great campus life at Shimla University.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are spacious and equipped with projectors and Wi-Fi. The library is well-stocked and useful for business studies, while the computer labs are functional. Hostel facilities are decent, with clean rooms and 24/7 water and electricity. The mess food is average but hygienic. Medical facilities are provided on campus, along with sports and gym facilities for students.

reviews.review_heading: Great University for introverts and if you love nature.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is just average. The labs still have old PCs, and while the Wi-Fi works in the labs, it is limited outside of them. The library is quite good and has plenty of books. Classrooms are fine, and the hostels are decent, equipped with almost all the necessary facilities. The canteen is spacious, but the food quality is inconsistent. There is a gym and sports equipment available for everyone to use.

reviews.review_heading: The overall review of this college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of the department are quite good compared to other departments, with facilities of free Wi-Fi, labs, and a library. The most attractive thing is the classroom. Through the classroom, you can see the beautiful natural scenery of Shimla, which looks very beautiful. The quality of the facilities in the hostel is good, with free Wi-Fi and hot water in winter. The quality of the food available in the mess and canteen is good, and the fee for the mess is around 4,500 ...

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and weather are good, but faculty and management need improvement.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is really good, and the weather is one of the best here. The hostel is neat and clean, and the quality of food is good. They provide non-veg four times a week. There are three types of rooms: basic, premium, and super premium, with varying prices.

reviews.review_heading: Discipline is very important in this college.
reviews.review_text:
Our university has a hostel which is a shared room. Around our campus, there are many Pgs also. The pgs cost around 6000 rupees per month. It includes the necessary eating things and pockets money. The room of the hostel is quite big for two students to stay. Hostel Fee: INR 100000 per year
External Expenses: Rs.4000 - Rs.7000.

reviews.review_heading: The college is scenic, serene and remote. Culture and exposure are good, but placements are average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is great. Classrooms, libraries and buildings are good. Facilities are great. A nurse is available here for medical responses. Canteen is great. There are many ethnicities in this college. You will get exposed to many types of people from many countries.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides a peaceful environment to study.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities and infrastructure were provided for students. We had Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. The library was quite good. The quality of the food served was also very good in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities, Sports and Games were also very good. Everything which was required by the student was available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: The worst university in the world.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility at the university is the worse than a 2G network while most of the systems in labs are useless. Classrooms are average, and only a few classrooms have projectors. There is no playground. The library is worse. As there is no playground, we can't think about the sports facilities for any kind of outdoor games. There is only a volleyball court available. One of the worst things is the food served in the college mess.

college_info.college_name: APG Shimla University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Fees for UG Courses like BE, B.Tech, B.Sc., LL.B., B.A.  and BBA ranges between INR 1.1 Lacs to 5 Lacs .
The fees is similar to other universities in India.
Students can go to the official website and enquire more about their desired courses and admission process at Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University.

Fees for UG courses like B.Sc, M.Sc, B.A.LL.B, Diploma, B.E, B.Tech, BCA, B.Com and others start at INR 25,000 to 2 Lakhs Per Annum. Fees for Certificate courses range from INR 20,000 to 35,000 . The Fees range is similar to any other university in Shimla with an average fee of 1 Lakhs .
You can know more about all the 70 courses offered at Alakh Prakash Goyal Shima University on their official website.

Yes, Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University offers scholarhsip to the meritorious and deserving candidates. The university offers scholarhsip based on merit, need-based, and scholarship test. It is mandatory for students to qualify the eligibility criteria set by the university for the eligible scholarhsip. APG Shimla University offers various scholarship according to differnt criteria.

The total annual fee for M.Tech course at Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University is INR 2 lakh. The fee is INR 1 Lacs for each year. Candidates who are shortlisted have to pay an admission at the time of seat confirmation. Aspirants are advised to pay the fee within the specified time to avoid cancellation of admission.

college_info.college_name: Nanaji Deshmukh Veterinary Science University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary: Nanaji Deshmukh Veterinary Science University was founded in 2009. It is a public university and is located in Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh. Nanaji Deshmukh Veterinary Science University courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. The institute offers courses in Full Time mode. Nanaji Deshmukh Veterinary Science University offers a total of 18 courses in stream such as Science. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are M.Sc., UG Diploma, B.F.Sc., BVSC and MVSC and the total seat intake for the available courses is 224. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Fisheries Science and Veterinary Science. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 1,00,898 to 2,38,909 and the average median salary is around INR 2,62,000. Apart from this, the Nanaji Deshmukh Veterinary Science University campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

placements.overview: Nanaji Deshmukh Veterinary Science University was founded in 2009. It is a public university and is located in Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh. Nanaji Deshmukh Veterinary Science University courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. The institute offers courses in Full Time mode. Nanaji Deshmukh Veterinary Science University offers a total of 18 courses in stream such as Science. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are M.Sc., UG Diploma, B.F.Sc., BVSC and MVSC and the total seat intake for the available courses is 224. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Fisheries Science and Veterinary Science. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 1,00,898 to 2,38,909 and the average median salary is around INR 2,62,000. Apart from this, the Nanaji Deshmukh Veterinary Science University campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Fisheries Science (B.F.Sc.) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Average experience but if you're interested in fishes you can join.

review_content.Placements: The students here are pretty united. Teachers are supportive and always there for you no matter what. Many fieldworks are done. Many matsya samiti are connected, so the placement is also good. One can pursue a career in feed companies, etc., or can do research here on many fish varieties.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available on campus as well as in the hostel. Departments are pretty good, and they coordinated well with each other. The mess of the hotel is also good, and the canteen is opened recently. Each year intercollegiate sports competitions and cultural events are also organized.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.V.Sc. and A.H. - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good facilities.

review_content.Placements: 40% of students are placed in BVSC and AH. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the minimum is 5 LPA. The top recruiters are ABC & MVU. The internship was good in my college, and the government hospital was interning us. The top role is government VAS (veterinary assistant surgeon).
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs were good, and wi-fi is not available for students. Classes were okay—not perfect, but okay. The hostel has excellent food and hygiene, as well as good hostel management. A fully furnished sports room and field are also available on college campus and all is well in my college .

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B. V. Sc. & A.H.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Nanaji Deshmukh Veterinary Science University.

review_content.Placements: Our college does not provide placements. It provides paid internships every month in the clinical industry.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college has many departments. It has five huge smart classrooms. We have many laboratories. Our college has a library for students. We have a good canteen. The hostel rooms are good and spacious. Playgrounds are available for sports.
review_content.Faculty: All faculty members are good and well-educated. They are experienced and knowledgeable. They teach us very well. Each subject has 3-4 teachers. Internal exams are difficult to pass. The pass criterion is 7 CGPA.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.V.Sc. and A.H. - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college for BVSC AH courses in Madhya Pradesh.

review_content.Placements: Almost 70% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary offered is Rs. 80,000 per month. The average salary offered is Rs. 40,000 per month. Almost 70% of students got internships. Top roles offered are veterinary assistant surgeon, veterinary officer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college has Wi-Fi, a library, a hostel, a canteen, etc. Classrooms are well-furnished. The food served in the mess is average. They provide medical and sports facilities. They conduct many games.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: This course is good for those who want the knowledge about animals.

review_content.Placements: The best experience in animal husbandry can be obtained in this college. From this course, one gets a government service with a recruitment test which can be applied after completing the course. There are campus selections also in college from all over India for animal concerning fields.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, all needed facilities were available for gaining knowledge such as practicals farm visits, anatomical study, etc. Hostel facilities were also available. The cultural fest was amazing for fun and representing your talent. The library was available with several books of knowledge.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.V.Sc. and A.H. - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college, with good teachers and good view.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students got placed in B.V.Sc and A.H course. The highest paid course is MVSC, and the lowest paid course is animal husbandry. Students got recruited in government hospitals, and every student got an internship in the veterinary course in rural hospitals. This is the best college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has almost all facilities like laboratories, libraries, and classrooms. Wi-Fi is not available for students in college. Good facilities are available in college as well as in hostel. The mess offers good food, and the canteen is far from the college. The sports ground is available, and games facilities are also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The education is good, but the infrastructure could be more good.

review_content.Placements: They give choices to kids to either get a placement on their own based on their personal choices or to be provide some hospital for an internship. Top recruiting companies, such as Adhar Hospital. About 80% of students get internships from the university as general physiotherapists.
review_content.Infrastructure: In my BPT course, we design machines related to our course, along with an OPD and labs for different subjects, such as the exercise therapy lab and anatomy lab. The college provides well-equipped hostels for both girls and boys, and there is a mess that provides three meals a day and snacks in the evening. The university annually organizes a sports meet, which lasts for three continuous days for intra-university students, along with various games.
